name: Ammon Bundy for Governor
subject: Country Star Collin Raye is coming to Idaho in Support of Ammon Bundy for Governor. Buy tickets today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by [Ammon Bundy for Governor](https://www
body:
| | [](https://www.votebundy.com)
---
| Peter,**_Collin Raye is coming to Idaho_**** _**for a special concert event in support of my run for governor!**_** He has sold millions of albums to country fans all over the world. He is one of the most celebrated country music artists ever. You have heard his number one hit songs like ["LOVE ME"](https://youtu.be/oCF-JMQW3GA), ["I CAN STILL FEEL YOU"](https://youtu.be/cvReRQE9Yzk) and ["LITTLE ROCK"](https://youtu.be/2kynobz0vq0). _Now, platinum selling artist Collin Raye with 30 singles charting on the country billboard charts and 4 number one hits is coming to Idaho on**February 23rd** in a special concert event to support the Ammon Bundy for Governor campaign._ This event will be held at [Stoney's Road House](https://stoneysroadhouse.com/) in Emmett, Idaho. _Tickets are limited and on sale now!_**For more information or to purchase tickets go to this link:**[**https://www.votebundy.com/concert**](https://www.votebundy.com/concert) _Make sure you let your friends know about Collin Raye coming to Idaho!_ Thank you, Ammon BundyP.S. This would make a great Christmas present!
[](https://www.votebundy.com/concert)

name: American Update
subject: The Genesis Story Online Course Now on DVD
body:
Hillsdale College’s popular online course, “The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,” is available on DVD. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8228%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KwGYX61Jp2oaKjn7rXsZUw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10025%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p28ZeQ3i7NzBeP49ROVlBg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,

I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College’s popular online course, **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,”** is available on DVD.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10025%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p28ZeQ3i7NzBeP49ROVlBg&sysid=1)In this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature.

“The Genesis Story” is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student’s theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it’s important to both faith and higher education.
< />
Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.

**For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College, you’ll receive the DVD as our thank you.**

To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to give it as a gift, please use the secure link here: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-genesis](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10026%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mL6KZDYDkDVx1bElpgdufA&sysid=1)**

As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of state and federal government funding--even indirectly through student loans and grants. That’s why your support is so crucial.

Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College’s national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of Americans nationwide, including our nation’s youth. Your gift will also help to:
* Increase the number of students taking free online courses, such as “Genesis.”
* Expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty.
* Open and support classical K-12 charter schools through the College’s Barney Charter School Initiative.
* Promote the principles of American constitutionalism through social media and the radio.

Friend, please use the secure link above to make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new DVD set of **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives.”**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8228%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KwGYX61Jp2oaKjn7rXsZUw&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8228%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KwGYX61Jp2oaKjn7rXsZUw&sysid=1)

My team just informed me

Folks,

I’d be lying to you if I said I wasn’t pretty upset about what my team just told me.

We came up well short of our November fundraising goal, and I’ve got to say that’s not good. Chuck Schumer’s going to be foaming at the mouth to take a shot at me this month, knowing that I don’t have the resources to fight back. Now I can take a punch, but I don’t want to take one if I can avoid it. **[So, if you’re able and willing to help me out, it’d mean the world to me if you’d rush what you can to support my re-election campaign for 2022.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z07hfi5ulo03uaseepg8kn3k7gjgihp9vr08gn7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji68or1cdh2bs)**

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing twitter and we need your help
body:
Big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook and Google are attacking, silencing, and censoring millions of conservatives.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfgidjcnf71sjf7gm81r0v8b64p69tgusvvi7m78_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji68pr0cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t3mmlhjfdj3m9hmep1gsur6cttn6ap33cricsqe6orkcdp62tjgsmqj4opiegrrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj30t5l6jg7cob665rj6phnm2qmash5u)
Dear Fellow Conservative, Big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook and Google are attacking, silencing, and censoring millions of conservatives. They’re targeting any conservative who dares question the government-approved opinions on vaccine mandates and the chaotic 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn’t bad enough –– we’ve now discovered that these **big _tech companies were conspiring with and taking orders from powerful liberal politicians!_** That’s right -- **we caught leftists government officials unconstitutionally colluding with “Big Tech” to silence their political opponents**! [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdbeq3mfc0cnjpa3h49l9hnleirbh78mha45klmo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji68pr0cph2bs) And unless conservatives like you and me take immediate action to stop them, our 1st Amendment rights will be nothing but meaningless words on an old piece of paper... That’s why I’m asking you to join our critical fight today... **[Will you rush back an emergency donation of $20 today to help us win our lawsuit against Twitter and these liberal elected officials?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlg52q1e5f5nsp1ipckvvku8vop8mt4nho6cm1e0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji68pr0cph2bs)** In case you missed our big announcement on _**Tucker Carlson Tonight**_ , let me explain. In 2018, California created the Office of Election Cybersecurity to “educate voters” with “valid information” on regarding elections. This new government office quickly became a _**political weapon**_ of the far-Left Secretary of State’s office which used it to censor and silence conservatives. And conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O’Handley quickly found himself a target. At first Rogan was banned from Twitter for violating “rules about election integrity.” Then, when Rogan questioned the chaotic presidential election procedures or the results it was deemed a “violation,” and quickly removed from Twitter. _But that’s not the worst of it..._ Recently, new documents prove that radical Leftist operatives working within California’s partisan Office of Election Cybersecurity instructed Twitter to censor Rogan. Just look at one exchange: Secretary of State Alex Padilla’s staff messaged Twitter and said: _**“We would like this tweet taken down ASAP.”**_ Then the next day Twitter responded saying, _“Thank you for reporting, Tweet has been removed. Please don’t hesitate to contact me if there is anything else we can do.”_ Then it happened... After Rogan dared to question the number of votes Joe Biden got during the election, Twitter permanently banned Rogan! **This proves that liberal government officials used government property to censor the political speech of their enemies****!!** And it’s NOT just a private company –– these radical “Big Tech” companies are working hand-in-glove with liberal politicians and government officials to silence and destroy conservatives. Please know that Rogan’s Twitter account was wildly popular and had more than 400,000 followers. **_It’s clear that the ONLY reason his account was banned was because the Left was worried that his tweets would damage Joe Biden’s image._** In fact, Rogan’s opinions didn’t just threaten the image of Joe Biden... These radicals were also worried that his tweets would destroy then-California Secretary of State Padilla –– _who was being considered to fill Kamala’s Harris’ vacated Senate seat!_ It doesn’t take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between “Big Tech” and the government to silence conservatives is corrupt and unconstitutional. That’s why my team of constitutional lawyers is suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault of the 1st Amendment. [**Will you help SAVE our free speech rights by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $20, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq71vf66r0sfd3nn0tjpf4d5fjv8r6r3natucpp0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji68pr0cph2bs) My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on _**Newsmax**_ and _**Fox News**_ with **Laura Ingraham, Tucker Carlson,** and **Shannon Bream**. I’ve been on a lot talking about our numerous battles _and victories_ against the radical Left. We went all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court to get houses of worship reopened and to stop the unconstitutional attacks on people of faith during COVID lockdowns. _**But I never thought the attacks on our individual rights would be this bad.**_ Not only are we suing Twitter –– a multi-billion-dollar corporation –– for its gross violation of Rogan’s 1st Amendment right to free speech... We’re also taking on former-Secretary of State Alex Padilla for conspiring with Twitter to silence conservatives. And even though we feel great about our case, this will be the hardest legal battle we’ve ever fought... You see, as a non-profit, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is because of the help and support of conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000... clean_body: Big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook and Google are attacking, silencing, and censoring millions of conservatives. Dear Fellow Conservative, Big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook and Google are attacking, silencing, and censoring millions of conservatives. They’re targeting any conservative who dares question the government-approved opinions on vaccine mandates and the chaotic 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn’t bad enough –– we’ve now discovered that these big tech companies were conspiring with and taking orders from powerful liberal politicians! That’s right -- we caught leftists government officials unconstitutionally colluding with “Big Tech” to silence their political opponents! And unless conservatives like you and me take immediate action to stop them, our 1st Amendment rights will be nothing but meaningless words on an old piece of paper... That’s why I’m asking you to join our critical fight today... In case you missed our big announcement on Tucker Carlson Tonight , let me explain. In 2018, California created the Office of Election Cybersecurity to “educate voters” with “valid information” on regarding elections. This new government office quickly became a political weapon of the far-Left Secretary of State’s office which used it to censor and silence conservatives. And conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O’Handley quickly found himself a target. At first Rogan was banned from Twitter for violating “rules about election integrity.” Then, when Rogan questioned the chaotic presidential election procedures or the results it was deemed a “violation,” and quickly removed from Twitter. But that’s not the worst of it... Recently, new documents prove that radical Leftist operatives working within California’s partisan Office of Election Cybersecurity instructed Twitter to censor Rogan. Just look at one exchange: Secretary of State Alex Padilla’s staff messaged Twitter and said: “We would like this tweet taken down ASAP.” Then the next day Twitter responded saying, “Thank you for reporting, Tweet has been removed. Please don’t hesitate to contact me if there is anything else we can do.” Then it happened... After Rogan dared to question the number of votes Joe Biden got during the election, Twitter permanently banned Rogan! This proves that liberal government officials used government property to censor the political speech of their enemies!! And it’s NOT just a private company –– these radical “Big Tech” companies are working hand-in-glove with liberal politicians and government officials to silence and destroy conservatives. Please know that Rogan’s Twitter account was wildly popular and had more than 400,000 followers. It’s clear that the ONLY reason his account was banned was because the Left was worried that his tweets would damage Joe Biden’s image. In fact, Rogan’s opinions didn’t just threaten the image of Joe Biden... These radicals were also worried that his tweets would destroy then-California Secretary of State Padilla –– who was being considered to fill Kamala’s Harris’ vacated Senate seat! It doesn’t take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between “Big Tech” and the government to silence conservatives is corrupt and unconstitutional. That’s why my team of constitutional lawyers is suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault of the 1st Amendment. My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on Newsmax and Fox News with Laura Ingraham, Tucker Carlson, and Shannon Bream. I’ve been on a lot talking about our numerous battles and victories against the radical Left. We went all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court to get houses of worship reopened and to stop the unconstitutional attacks on people of faith during COVID lockdowns. But I never thought the attacks on our individual rights would be this bad. Not only are we suing Twitter –– a multi-billion-dollar corporation –– for its gross violation of Rogan’s 1st Amendment right to free speech... We’re also taking on former-Secretary of State Alex Padilla for conspiring with Twitter to silence conservatives. And even though we feel great about our case, this will be the hardest legal battle we’ve ever fought... name: Chief James Craig
subject: We’re 38th in the nation, but we should be #1.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
It’s no secret: Michigan’s education system has been in dire straits for years.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv2jk1vuct6psp3ui53c0mrrqhr6iv8008jbaec0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ujib4d9jm9jb2tj2cjg74o3kmlrm2slme6o6atj4cpr6copkmepr5djkmdgr2o37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0slhcppb9cr0sup7aphhm2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or6cjie8p33clim49fg)
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7kkk698hh56k2ldtujlsjampb9oe5c0q19d2g40_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji68or5clh2bs) Friend, It’s no secret: Michigan’s education system has been in dire straits for years. And it’s getting worse.... [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z55t6kfc4hip32qh1lkbr7qis1kd9o2qgld6jo5g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji68or5clh2bs)
* In 2020, Michigan ranked #34 in education. Now we’re even lower... and sit at #38.
* 8.1% of Detroit Public School students – and just 2-in-5 students statewide – are proficient in reading by the 3rd grade. **_That is unacceptable._**
* Schools are focused on implementing Critical Race Theory – a woke activist agenda – instead of improving reading proficiency rates for students.

[**SAVE OUR SCHOOLS**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1dp08q53c53vv5kgl4q0ikuhcig3785vetq4ekg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji68or5clh2bs) **_Gov. Whitmer compounded the problem instead of fixing the issue._** **_Whitmer vetoed bills that would have..._**
* Allowed parents to choose what school their child attended.
* Provided students with opportunities to receive outside tutoring and instruction for reading.
* Garnered additional funding for charter schools.

[**PUT STUDENTS FIRST**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1rkq3lul7qlcql14s3gtm812jqfbajtoi9fl3gg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji68or5clh2bs) **When you look at vulnerable communities where there’s heightened poverty, there’s a correlation with crime, there’s a correlation with poor education –**** _and that’s unacceptable._** A decent education is a way for children to lift themselves up and out of poverty. But that’s impossible if our schools are failing our students. I’m concerned about the direction our education system is heading, friend. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. **My name is Chief James Craig.** [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgvkij4sqf7c3v9cpjgf87vko5m9t3t61s7uk0so_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji68or5clh2bs) I grew up in Detroit and attended Cass Tech, where I learned the importance of a good education.
**And it’s that very education that allowed me to spend the majority of my life**** _serving others and leading from the front._** [**BACK THE CHIEF**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z77dun4h4r4kb0i3de85q9g3rkrblhabfsdqst0g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji68or5clh2bs) Like so many other Michiganders, I worked on the assembly line at Chrysler. Eventually, I decided to pursue a career in law enforcement and joined the Detroit Police Department in 1977. In 1981, I moved to Los Angeles and joined the LAPD, where I spent the next 27 years. I then spent two years as Chief of Police in Portland, ME, and another two years as Chief of Police in Cincinnati, OH. **I was given the opportunity to return home to Detroit in 2013, where I spent the final eight years of my law enforcement career as Chief of Police.** Throughout my career, I’ve seen first-hand the effect _real_ leadership has on a community. When I returned to Detroit, our police department was in shambles. Morale was low. Equipment was broken. **_And our community deserved better._** [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zihivkpv33j9boqjtjjjb0csqghshgfsd2dr99n0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji68or5clh2bs) One of the first things I did was tackle Colony Arms, an apartment complex that was the epicenter of crime in our city. I led my team in and we mounted an assault. We arrested 20-30 people and cleaned the area up. The word got around: the police force was back in Detroit – and we would _never_ allow criminals to rule our city again.
**This is the kind of leadership Michigan students**** _deserve – and that’s why I’m running._** [**STAND WITH CHIEF JAMES CRAIG**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjesd5ab6l9oce62n6c3ao1epml5ckvt89ijdn9o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji68or5clh2bs) We can’t expect our children to grow into the leaders of tomorrow if they lack the tools today. **_They need someone that will not just stand by them but someone that will lead them down the right path._** _I’ve led from the front my entire career – and I want to do it again as Michigan’s next governor._ **_With your help, that vision can become a reality._** [**Will you support my campaign so I can bring leadership back to the governor’s mansion?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcbotsp397v4tvp9ngg0scnl7us3bc7264tol2gg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji68or5clh2bs) _**_By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution_**_ [**DONATE $100**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3jqtkbs0trnsjtu995ujuk6hjpnmgu38bcgn0e0_) [**DONATE $75**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z42ton9mcbaf3h2rfsv686bieuvf816cp8ughb4g_) [**DONATE $50**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl8ssgan5ch0bvgprp66lch8fh4ipm3852t5fohg_) [**DONATE $25**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1m85dmf05jfnukui6geep0048tjq75rb4r42iqg_) [**DONATE ANY AMOUNT**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze7pg51q0i7lit9c1j8eqei9o4ddbtk1cmptptbg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji68or5clh2bs) _**_If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically._**_ Thank you, [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlksare094m7h19le844h17kkoci3g18fi6ujr9o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji68or5clh2bs) Chief James Craig |

name: Trump Social Media Notifications
subject: Private message for Fellow Patriot
body:
As a Trump Social Member, you are the first to receive this private message. Open ASAP. It's time sensitive.

|
---
| | | **PRIVATE MESSAGE FOR TRUMP SOCIAL MEMBERS:**

We texted you yesterday asking if you'll accept President Trump's friend request but never heard back.

_**Fellow Patriot, was this a mistake?**_ 98% accepted, so you are now in the bottom 2% of all Trump supporters.

Because you were one of the first to pledge to join Trump social, _**[we have resent your Trump friend request and extended your deadline for another 5 minutes.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59049457:Jpz1crENC:m:1:3299561967:20682D6C314F64327A2A2D7B4909BC3E:r "we have resent your Trump friend request and extended your deadline for another 5 minutes.")**_

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Don't let young conservatives miss this!
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a brand new event:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrle5j5vc985lbd6uqd7cu3ljl44t2etfd7k9o3g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2tlge9j76sr3maonct72c9gbatbic1p7fc30s9h30sbnmprr9p76m1hb4c716urt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eaomcslkmdi3fclgcoqm1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdj69p74clh60ob24no)
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpk3ho9a2aks8muru3qi8pk4icc7n17he3ookdt0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji6aoj0c5h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsefhsthhcfi67ksf5qhr7mcjo3tmkmjl55vr78g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji6aoj0c5h2bs) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ —and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021—but we need your help to do it.******](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3soh65ea5g4tisu1kvk0dq1dqe87i4mfkek4a7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji6aoj0c5h2bs) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi38use2ga6l3jfh4at1eqjrpu8anphvlk519l60_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji6aoj0c5h2bs)**[?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp5m0psa0oouvvvmgb8g4jaick079j88h9apm2f0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji6aoj0c5h2bs) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2slsqur54rug5gk10ljpfu2ha498ueb5r6eavsg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji6aoj0c5h2bs)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3g89kouhvbsidhgfvqo0d8m5pp9fddn9lmm3nd0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji6aoj0c5h2bs)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkuac17qplia49habc0raqtmpq7ai9oa8mm6m3uo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji6aoj0c5h2bs) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjrruunfjvoam4j2ronecic9var3p7972ckl87v0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji6aoj0c5h2bs)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr7f7mvk3ou5j1offbso68ku6fcrhf8l9qhgtb80_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji6aoj0c5h2bs)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4msja5ohfvnqpkgs1d6scu6sd1jfa2cs3juptsg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji6aoj0c5h2bs)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9016v823poa6jo3u3in7mb3id3od06gt89qkato_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji6aoj0c5h2bs)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— _and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** —[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm3jb55hpa5vd8e71vv20i2v21a5a499ipa939uo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sji6aoj0c5h2bs)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zqi2piv8s7daeg82n7650k516did6eo8g9kl74j8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona . If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, AmericaFest 2021 will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to**bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war. Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens And Many More! Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson And More Musical Guests! Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need YOUR help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for AmericaFest 2021 and have promised not to disappoint! It’s going to be awesome. Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— and so much more. If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** — With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

**Team, we're worried:**
**FIRST** Governor DeSantis won his first race in 2018 by less than _half a point._

**THEN** the Cook Political Report rated this race as “Leans Red,” and polls show Charlie neck-and-neck with Governor DeSantis.

**NOW** Governor DeSantis’ mega-rich Republican allies are spending BIG to try to buy Ron DeSantis the election! They know he’s vulnerable.
With the polls consistently showing a tight race, next November is our chance to kick Governor DeSantis out of office and protect Floridians from his dangerous, divisive politics. **But the margin of victory in the last governor’s race was just 0.4% -- so we’re going to need _everyone_ to do their part to help Charlie win.**

While DeSantis has his army of out-of-state billionaires funding his campaign, Charlie is counting on grassroots supporters like you to help him fight back. **And in a state like Florida where _every_ race comes down to the wire, your donation today could make the difference between winning and losing.**

**[So please, friend, don’t wait: Pitch in anything you can to help us reach our $12,000 Defeat DeSantis goal by tomorrow’s deadline and let’s get to work on finally building a Florida for ALL Floridians!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39821949/321594407/-407125337?refcode=20211219_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDZkMzJkMS1jZjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1wFeqoAWBdHCV1_JqVOcy0RKZjchYvQSyr3eTfCwm4=)**

name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: What are your priorities?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
Did you see the survey that Letitia sent around, Peter?

As your attorney general, she has made it her responsibility to fight for the justice and security of every hardworking New Yorker, especially the vulnerable. Letitia is eager to continue the fight, but first she needs to know what matters most to you and your loved ones.
Before I meet with Letitia tomorrow morning, I have to ask: **Will you take a second to take her crucial priorities survey before our midnight deadline? Letitia is ready to fight for the voice of every single New Yorker, but we still need to hear from 328 more people to meet our goal.**
Thanks for being a part of this team to continue to change our state for the better.

David
Team James \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Letitia James
Date: Friday, Dec 16, 2021
Subject: I need to hear from you
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39822608/321598560/-380720473?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk232-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWYxMGJiNS1kNDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OT_HMOPjiLhfaUeIshr7uhOtHIuoIjsT_weR4wWNH10=&emci=0a1d9bb5-aa5a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=55f10bb5-d460-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369504)

That’s why we created this quick priorities survey so that everyone can make their voices heard. [**Will you spend a moment now to take this survey and let me know what matters most to you? We need 417 more responses before midnight tomorrow to reach our goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39822609/321598561/-380720473?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk232-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWYxMGJiNS1kNDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OT_HMOPjiLhfaUeIshr7uhOtHIuoIjsT_weR4wWNH10=&emci=0a1d9bb5-aa5a-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=55f10bb5-d460-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369504)

As your attorney general, I have never shied away from a hard fight if it meant protecting everyday working New Yorkers. I’ve sued the Trump Administration, the gun lobby, and Big Pharma all to fight for a more perfect version of our state that benefits everyone.

**I’m determined to keep up this fight for you and your loved ones, but first I need to know where your priorities lie, ****Peter. **

name: Bo Hines
subject: RINOs refuse to fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bo Hines for Congress_**
body:
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59341022:s18S1GH8N:m:1:2365227053:6452B651FF5454C04974E5798723303A:r)

Peter,

Putting America First means going on offense.

Congress is a swamp full of radical socialists scheming to destroy the country.

**And there are too many RINOs like Liz Cheney that refuse to fight back.**

My name is Bo Hines, and I am running for Congress in North Carolina as the 100 percent pro-Life, 100 percent pro-gun, and 100 percent pro-Trump candidate to take our country back.

That's why leaders of the America First movement like Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene, Congressman Madison Cawthorn, and Congressman Paul Gosar endorsed my campaign.

**[I hope you will join them in supporting my campaign by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, or $50 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59341022:s18S1GH8N:m:1:2365227053:6452B651FF5454C04974E5798723303A:r).**

I know it's been tough the last year watching Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer push to transform our great country into something unrecognizable.

Inflation soared to record levels, and Joe Bide responded by demanding Congress dump another $2,500,000,000,000 in debt on the hands of every man, woman, and child in America.

**Joe Biden dismantled Donald Trump's successful border policies resulting in a record number of illegal aliens storming across the border expecting amnesty and voting rights.**

And Democrats insist your present your vaccine passport to eat inside a restaurant while scheming to dismantle voter ID laws.

I'm running for Congress because I'm a pro-Trump outsider not afraid to take on these tough fights.

That's why some of Donald Trump's biggest supporters in the America First movement, like Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene, Congressman Madison Cawthorn, and Congressman Paul Gosar endorsed my campaign.

**[Today I'm asking you to join them and chip in a donation of $10, $25, $50- or whatever you can afford right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59341022:s18S1GH8N:m:1:2365227053:6452B651FF5454C04974E5798723303A:r).**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59341022:s18S1GH8N:m:1:2365227053:6452B651FF5454C04974E5798723303A:r)

The values I learned on the gridiron to help win a football scholarship to North Carolina state are needed now in Washington more than ever.

_In North Carolina, we play to the whistle, and we play to win_.
---
*** Stop Voter fraud by supporting voter ID and opposing the Democrats radical federal election takeover bill;*** Build the wall and champion Donald Trump's America First immigration policies;*** Ban critical race theory because leftwing activists should not indoctrinate children to hate America with racist lies;*** Oppose Big Tech censorship and protect free speech; and*** Fire Dr. Fauci for attacking our fundamental freedom and liberty through illegal and immoral mandates and lockdowns.
[**STAND WITH BO HINES
CHIP IN $10 RIGHT AWAY**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59341022:s18S1GH8N:m:1:2365227053:6452B651FF5454C04974E5798723303A:r) **Establishment RINOs sat back on defense for too long.**

Republicans immersed in the D.C. swamp fear fake news media calling them names the second they lift a finger to oppose Joe Biden's socialist agenda.

But I know tough problems require tough thinking and a spine of steel.

I promise you that I will always fight for what matters.

That's why fearless conservative fighters like Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, and Madison Cawthorn endorsed my campaign.

**[Would you please join them and chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, or $250 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59341022:s18S1GH8N:m:1:2365227053:6452B651FF5454C04974E5798723303A:r)?**

Sincerely,

Bo Hines

name: Great America Update
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6696%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ZpWDPpTUxU44wH%2be7SzZ4g&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68090%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kV9dJwiM2HLCAU5bC7h6Fw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68090%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kV9dJwiM2HLCAU5bC7h6Fw&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68091%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KKBJfUYQYXUin2YT3Lifaw&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

clean_body: Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course | | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: We need your signature now for the U.S. Constitution
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Fellow American, You don’t need me to tell you that our Constitution is under attack. And to make matters worse, far too many Americans—especially those in the younger generations—simply don’t seem to care. But with one signature, you can help us change that sad reality! A **GENEROUS DONOR** has pledged to cover the cost of printing and distributing one copy of our **Pocket Constitution** to a high school or college student— _a $5 value!_ —for every signature we can get on our **AFFIRMATION OF THE UNITED STATES CONSTITUTION**. [**Will you take a moment right now to show your support for our nation’s most important document and help send a copy of it to a young American today? It costs nothing more than a moment of your time, and it can help change the course of our nation.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.--Slz7xUT9q_d7y9-SSA) **Turning Point USA** stands strong in the belief that **The Constitution of the United States of America** is the greatest political document ever written. It ensures limited governmental power and protects our sacred individual rights. **That’s why we have already distributed printed copies of the _United States Constitution_ to _THOUSANDS_ of students across America.** [**But now, with this tremendous opportunity from our generous donor, we can accelerate those efforts beyond anything we had ever dared to hope!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-8gFkRiZ7ZyH2dTqhqELQ) As Abraham Lincoln said, “** _We The People_** _are the rightful masters of both Congress and the courts—not to overthrow_** _The Constitution_** _—but to overthrow the men who pervert the_** _Constitution_** _."_ We the People have a responsibility to uphold the **U.S. Constitution** and to educate others about its value**.** And that’s a responsibility that we at Turning Point USA take very seriously. **We have created an educational, informative, exciting, and visually _beautiful_ version of the U.S. Constitution to be distributed to **_**_HUNDREDS of THOUSANDS_**_**of students across this great nation.** And we are uniquely positioned to execute this massive distribution—because we have the largest network of conservative students active in America today. Our nationwide membership now numbers over **_400,000 students_** in chapters on over **_3,000 high school and college campuses!_** [**All that’s lacking in this plan is the funding—and you can help us raise it simply by signing your name to our AFFIRMATION OF THE UNITED STATES CONSTITUTION.** ](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) Remember—the moment you sign, a generous donor will immediately cover the cost of printing and distributing a copy of the U.S. Constitution to a high school or college student!
---
[**I Want To Sign**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-eEmMewBAj3h0uSbl1jEA)
---
If you are a true believer in the importance of the United States Constitution and want to spread the word to America’s young people, there has never been a better opportunity to get involved. For many of these young students, this will be the first time they have seen our founding document presented in such a compelling format. It could truly change the course of their political life. [**With just your signature, you can change the future of our nation by providing a high school or college student with a copy of our TPUSA Pocket Constitution—a $5 value****.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-ljF1KOKZw) Please help **Turning Point USA** put the**U.S. Constitution** into the hands of thousands— _if not millions_ —of young Americans across the country today! Thank you, and God bless you. For liberty,
---
For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & PresidentTurning Point USA

We’re counting on you,

Shontel Brown for Congress

As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. name: American Update
subject: Be one of the first
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8212%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=YU3Tt6%2fjsjODUD7ajdayCg&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10029%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7X%2bjeu9ZluQOoEGusZHFpA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10029%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7X%2bjeu9ZluQOoEGusZHFpA&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10020%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AC%2b%2bFogwiGVBCSQnnvbk3A&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ziu97ahraib807v94m0nhnh8dvj2k6o7lq7aolho_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sjh6eo72cph2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Nikki Fried
subject: My fight as a public defender
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,

Here in Florida, the race for Governor is heating up every day. And with so much going on, it’s easy to let the latest news get in the way of the bigger picture: bringing something new to Florida.

So, as the year comes to a close, I wanted to take a moment to tell you why I spend every day fighting to bring something new to our state.

When I was young, I always knew that I wanted to stand up for people who had been denied a voice. And, once I earned my law degree, that’s exactly what I did.

I chose to become a public defender, advocating for marginalized and underrepresented people and doing my part to uphold the promise of a fair, accessible justice system in our state.

From standing up for homeowners during the financial crisis to advocating for criminal justice reform in Tallahassee, I’ve dedicated my career to serving the people of Florida. I’ve fought to secure justice, help working families, and make your voices heard when it matters most.

And I can promise you that, as your next Governor, I will always fight for you.

Because that’s what you deserve, Peter — a fresh, new voice in Tallahassee who will fight every day to build a more just, safe, and prosperous Florida for all Floridians. And with your help, I know we can make it happen. Can you chip in $10 today to help me win this race and bring something new to our state? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-dec-2021?refcode=publicdefender]

Thank you for being on my team.

With gratitude,
Nikki

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-dec-2021?refcode=publicdefender]

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: I refuse to be another sellout
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I’m running to get things done for Pennsylvania's working families
#

Folks,
From day one of our campaign, I’ve been adamant that I wouldn't take a penny from corporate PACs, corporate lobbyists, or the fossil fuel industry. And there’s a reason for that.
It’s because I’ve experienced first-hand how awful and terrifying it is to be sold out by a government meant to protect us — and I refuse to be another sellout.
I realize that we’ve sent a lot of messages recently, especially about our upcoming FEC deadline, but I’m reaching out again because we have big goals to hit this month.
[I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t absolutely necessary — could you please chip in $3 to my campaign today? $3 is a small price to pay to give Pennsylvania working families the champion they deserve.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39835175/321632935/-360183459?refcode2=7dca7ac1-e460-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211219-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGNhN2FjMS1lNDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lxvyp8HM7zxuhGb8Hy6FQM50a90AHCM2BugBOSrA2BI=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39835177/321632937/-360183459?refcode2=7dca7ac1-e460-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211219-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGNhN2FjMS1lNDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lxvyp8HM7zxuhGb8Hy6FQM50a90AHCM2BugBOSrA2BI=)**
If you didn’t know, FEC deadlines are federally-mandated. And after they pass we must publish a public-facing report that shows how much our campaign has raised over a certain period of time.
Once our opponents get their hands on our report, they’re looking for one thing, and one thing only: If we have what it takes to beat them.
It’s the most critical deadline of this race, and all eyes are on us.
[So I’m personally asking again: Will you pitch in $3, or whatever you can afford at this time, to ensure that this movement pulls through?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39835178/321632939/-360183459?refcode2=7dca7ac1-e460-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211219-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGNhN2FjMS1lNDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lxvyp8HM7zxuhGb8Hy6FQM50a90AHCM2BugBOSrA2BI=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39835179/321632940/-360183459?refcode2=7dca7ac1-e460-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211219-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGNhN2FjMS1lNDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lxvyp8HM7zxuhGb8Hy6FQM50a90AHCM2BugBOSrA2BI=)**
I’m running to get things done for Pennsylvania's working families. Thank you for helping me get there.
Malcolm

Hey, friends. We’re getting closer and closer to 2022, and I’m taking stock. And the more I think about it, the more it seems like one of the biggest problems facing us is political polarization.
From the very beginning, this campaign has sought to address that crisis by doing things differently, because we really are all stranded together on this earth with rising fascism and a climate crisis rapidly engulfing us. But the more polarized we become, the harder it gets to solve these problems.
[**Will you chip in a buck or two to help us find a way to talk to one another again so that we can actually get things done for Floridians?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39836330/321638390/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211219polarizevar_EG_main_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDY1MzNjMS1lNzYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wpq33GmKXILPc8yH1TUGSUJD9RAkvkmzR-W6li8WThM=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39836335/321638392/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211219polarizevar_EG_main_SLA_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDY1MzNjMS1lNzYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wpq33GmKXILPc8yH1TUGSUJD9RAkvkmzR-W6li8WThM=)
---
As you’ve probably noticed, this campaign may sound a little different. I may not use every catchphrase you wanna hear, and I may come up with a few of my own! That’s by design, so that we can reach people who’ve never felt included in politics, provide a little levity, and bring people together for a common cause in the process.**Because this campaign is not about me—it is truly about us.**
When I say “us” I don’t just mean progressive Democrats. I don’t just mean Democrats. The reality is that, in order to enact progress we need to be challenged, regularly and without vitriol or nastiness. I mean folks who want a better life and who—whether they realize it or not—will choose love and solidarity over division and hatred.**I’m in this thing because I really do believe that most people will choose love and solidarity.** Otherwise, what would be the point?
But let’s be absolutely clear about one thing: **That doesn’t mean we’re not going to hold bad actors and supporters of an armed insurrection accountable.** It just means, at the end of the day, we have to run a campaign that’s in tune with what people actually need from Washington: affordable healthcare, climate action, protecting people from COVID-19, saving our democracy, and a whole lot more.
[**So, can you give $5, $10, or $50, if you’re ready and able, to help send me to Congress and _actually get stuff done?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39836336/321638423/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211219polarizevar_EG_main_SLA_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDY1MzNjMS1lNzYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wpq33GmKXILPc8yH1TUGSUJD9RAkvkmzR-W6li8WThM=)

body:
President Obama said it best when he said the filibuster is a “Jim Crow relic” that must be eliminated. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39836318/321638350/1434030581?refcode=EM_FR_211219filibuster_N_AL_90DA_5_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTY4MTZiNC1lNzYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJOzWtj3Ui67Y7rLLiVuCe11NT_e49l8aWdvPuBYxyk=)

Peter, I’ll get to the point right away: **We need to eliminate the filibuster in order to get things done.**

President Obama said it best when he said the filibuster is a “Jim Crow relic” that must be eliminated. There is good legislation being proposed -- like the For the People Act, a $15 minimum wage, codifying _Roe v. Wade_ , and more -- that would make a huge difference in people’s lives being held up by Minority Leader Mitch McConnell.

Senators are elected to make change and represent the people, not hold up legislation and do nothing. Let’s make Congress more representative of the people’s wishes and less like political chess.

Ron Johnson and Mitch McConnell are counting on keeping the filibuster to stop progress in the Senate, and we need to put an end to it.

**[I’m asking you to chip in $10 or whatever you can today to help us beat Ron Johnson, solidify our Senate Majority and then eliminate the filibuster once and for clean_body: President Obama said it best when he said the filibuster is a “Jim Crow relic” that must be eliminated. | | = Peter, I’ll get to the point right away: We need to eliminate the filibuster in order to get things done. President Obama said it best when he said the filibuster is a “Jim Crow relic” that must be eliminated. There is good legislation being proposed -- like the For the People Act, a $15 minimum wage, codifying Roe v. Wade , and more -- that would make a huge difference in people’s lives being held up by Minority Leader Mitch McConnell. Senators are elected to make change and represent the people, not hold up legislation and do nothing. Let’s make Congress more representative of the people’s wishes and less like political chess. Ron Johnson and Mitch McConnell are counting on keeping the filibuster to stop progress in the Senate, and we need to put an end to it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = It’s time to get to work, and that means getting rid of the filibuster. -Alex Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Having an understanding of the issues affecting the people of Arizona helps us so much as we build our people-powered campaign. So, can you take our one click poll to help us decide on our top priorities for 2022? Your response will be immediately recorded and sent to O'Halleran HQ | = = = = Thank you for letting us know your priority for the new year.= Tom already has several extremist opponents, and he might even be running against Paul Gosar. We cannot afford to yield even an inch of ground to their dangerous ideas, and any amount you can spare would have a huge impact. \-- O’Halleran Survey Team **Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today. = | ****=****** | | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

_\---------- Forwarded message ---------_
From: Martin Heinrich
Date: Sat, Dec 4, 2021
Subject: Roe v. Wade (petition)
Folks, just days ago, the Supreme Court heard arguments in a case that could directly overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and dismantle women’s health care rights.
This is the same Supreme Court that is now stacked with conservative judges that Donald Trump nominated.
**It can seem unthinkable, but it’s real and it’s imminent.** _Roe v. Wade_ is more at risk of being overturned right now than it has been since it was decided nearly 50 years ago.
**This is bad for women and everyone who believes in equitable access to health care and a woman’s constitutional right to choose.**
We need to act quickly at the federal level. We need to make sure that the reproductive rights of every woman, no matter what state she lives in, are protected.
[**I’m proud to be an original co-sponsor of the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ , which would protect women’s reproductive rights no matter what the Court does next. Truth be told, he was here to rally the GOP's most extreme base before the 2022 election, attack Maggie, and raise money for extreme Trump Republicans. Maggie is one of the most vulnerable Senators up for reelection in 2022 (she only won her last race by 1,017 votes), and Senate control could boil down to New Hampshire. **[I told Maggie we could raise $10,000 today to help protect against Cotton’s attacks, and I need you to make a $5 donation to help us get there. Senator Jeanne Shaheen

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze2ienqentaug3fp2g30tbcjkfo4ummopr90k740_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sjj68ob2chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tj6eqr7dc5nctj6aodnm8q78oli6kojepdgc4pr4sjim9orctbhetjr0tb661g6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb2pjimapm1pti69j31c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1l6vt0stdhf8ueeearfuojjm5bv4t3frt50r2i0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sjj68ob2chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3q25ojdos3qu8qdclhdh8trsgpmlhubov5u0k70_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sjj68ob2chh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze0lgb423hadqksb6oe4bq9njft6lg6k9nep5cf0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sjj68ob2chh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

clean_body: I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course | | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. name: ICYMI News
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkk3s2egfqadbu6jsmv9ksujha4163qpofneaur8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sjj68ob2cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2elsmca811grtq9dqfgjogabvllo1h9pe03n7p0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sjj68ob2cjh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgg2cv4jlspmu5igdievfp3o1aosbhj2mdqfat58_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sjj68ob2cjh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

clean_body: I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I | Sponsored message | ---|---|--- | | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Greater Georgia
subject: Greater Georgia Newsletter – Dec. 19
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vKOp7ANZ2NkAiPYNJ9N4VnJqXsIYNmrdASmFek_bLPYqA6EFrxQwhXxp3zJ7DOjmRCtKHKXEIDG3seZ-T0WiRIw1d8ge20exnfzEUz969Y5BE-Det9O6JtnvEpzT-oaCk_oHUuXhjLS8SjJV6UrhZA==&c=hVxJkoucckJNRxikZcRIrEx-vy8Xeml2db_TFJWTQS8v2UWfnD1JyA==&ch=qQxXeUcCNbBDZRfleYBuxqNN4zOah2XuD1zbaVKu8BmhT7HY0kryIQ==)
---
| Please see the below statement from Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler on the passing of former U.S. Senator Johnny Isakson:
Senator Johnny Isakson leaves an indelible mark of service and grace on Georgia, the Senate and our country. God blessed our state with this tireless champion of building bridges, who dedicated his life to his faith, family, and community.
In the Senate, I was honored at sit at his desk, which he signed, and was reminded of his powerful legacy that will inspire Georgians for generations to come. Jeff and I send our love and prayers to Dianne and the Isakson family.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vKOp7ANZ2NkAiPYNJ9N4VnJqXsIYNmrdASmFek_bLPYqA6EFrxQwhQ1CD1bKkRwVMKoPeMJN6x0hH4rYCJf-XoubrjNh9qa3vEd4C8vs31GSq1TxjEzvdddB3rLMaCrxFZ7pJQkjKQzh1p4d5E3KpIVM67Iij40iunNKHgu6DeMcU-O17aU6q61--4TNB8pM&c=hVxJkoucckJNRxikZcRIrEx-vy8Xeml2db_TFJWTQS8v2UWfnD1JyA==&ch=qQxXeUcCNbBDZRfleYBuxqNN4zOah2XuD1zbaVKu8BmhT7HY0kryIQ==)
---
| | |
---
| As we close out 2021, Greater Georgia is working hard to connect with voters and stay involved in local communities to ensure every Georgian knows their voices are heard and their votes count.
Recently, our team visited with several conservative groups to discuss Greater Georgia's work to register and engage voters and to spread love and cheer this holiday season. View pictures below of team members dropping by the [Cobb County GOP Holiday Party](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vKOp7ANZ2NkAiPYNJ9N4VnJqXsIYNmrdASmFek_bLPYqA6EFrxQwhQ1CD1bKkRwVqaFsy40dUK1sJt1h_40qX6cCFXAagvIRy8b7Kqn7ZQiiKAh2YRoytJCN-6o_2Uzwe8O6D_m9oKL_yPxOu8fNdeHcuzS2I1YzPVlsojNgPT7-KfRXvLVFcdKKKnfClvzqWNwqR-KfA3E=&c=hVxJkoucckJNRxikZcRIrEx-vy8Xeml2db_TFJWTQS8v2UWfnD1JyA==&ch=qQxXeUcCNbBDZRfleYBuxqNN4zOah2XuD1zbaVKu8BmhT7HY0kryIQ==) and conducting a [grassroots training session](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vKOp7ANZ2NkAiPYNJ9N4VnJqXsIYNmrdASmFek_bLPYqA6EFrxQwhQ1CD1bKkRwV3k17yZBF9FJQ02z_IXjazvSxiQnUwFYwJ7kbP_ZnaG77sUb1fIZ6KuwHajWKSkuwaq-Et4_f4Ww4JZ_E2tHI8yExgZZpEXavjrYIHSmWeJHn18Nan30NUHkTHmPAY6f_cdHTnq6G8uU=&c=hVxJkoucckJNRxikZcRIrEx-vy8Xeml2db_TFJWTQS8v2UWfnD1JyA==&ch=qQxXeUcCNbBDZRfleYBuxqNN4zOah2XuD1zbaVKu8BmhT7HY0kryIQ==) with the 6th District chapter of the Association of Mature American Citizens.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vKOp7ANZ2NkAiPYNJ9N4VnJqXsIYNmrdASmFek_bLPYqA6EFrxQwhQ1CD1bKkRwVqaFsy40dUK1sJt1h_40qX6cCFXAagvIRy8b7Kqn7ZQiiKAh2YRoytJCN-6o_2Uzwe8O6D_m9oKL_yPxOu8fNdeHcuzS2I1YzPVlsojNgPT7-KfRXvLVFcdKKKnfClvzqWNwqR-KfA3E=&c=hVxJkoucckJNRxikZcRIrEx-vy8Xeml2db_TFJWTQS8v2UWfnD1JyA==&ch=qQxXeUcCNbBDZRfleYBuxqNN4zOah2XuD1zbaVKu8BmhT7HY0kryIQ==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vKOp7ANZ2NkAiPYNJ9N4VnJqXsIYNmrdASmFek_bLPYqA6EFrxQwhQ1CD1bKkRwVqaFsy40dUK1sJt1h_40qX6cCFXAagvIRy8b7Kqn7ZQiiKAh2YRoytJCN-6o_2Uzwe8O6D_m9oKL_yPxOu8fNdeHcuzS2I1YzPVlsojNgPT7-KfRXvLVFcdKKKnfClvzqWNwqR-KfA3E=&c=hVxJkoucckJNRxikZcRIrEx-vy8Xeml2db_TFJWTQS8v2UWfnD1JyA==&ch=qQxXeUcCNbBDZRfleYBuxqNN4zOah2XuD1zbaVKu8BmhT7HY0kryIQ==)
---
|
---
|

| INTERNSHIP PROGRAM
Greater Georgia has officially launched an [internship program](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vKOp7ANZ2NkAiPYNJ9N4VnJqXsIYNmrdASmFek_bLPYqA6EFrxQwhUjk7BiDbIO2yeSWo2j_wCaYk9u_yLxfnfb_5cqsl8i642tVLwpmM5B_Uey8eYp5oMiGP-lHO_vp8l24TWVdbTfyn4_UzMplFDqCdEOcFNvhqvWmTsI7Gsc=&c=hVxJkoucckJNRxikZcRIrEx-vy8Xeml2db_TFJWTQS8v2UWfnD1JyA==&ch=qQxXeUcCNbBDZRfleYBuxqNN4zOah2XuD1zbaVKu8BmhT7HY0kryIQ==)! We are recruiting interns to assist with voter registration and engagement. This opportunity will be great to learn the ropes of political organizing, including how to get out the vote, how to engage with voters in a variety of communities, and more. Possible areas of compensation include class credit, milage reimbursement, and cash incentives based on goal-oriented progress.
If you or someone you know is interested, please contact Outreach Coordinator Terry Fye at terry@greatergeorgia.com with questions or to submit a completed application.
The full internship application can be found [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vKOp7ANZ2NkAiPYNJ9N4VnJqXsIYNmrdASmFek_bLPYqA6EFrxQwhZXE3dHXqSyDANHQAlvCSxDb1g-NZC2M8VikZ8TMsjfJf6i-gietpaz_Dod3iNue1PqAX4oLDOKhItXOdZiDQQWq1RvlgPz3nryaYQf57XA7Pu8gdDSlSbebLVvATHwe4hbPu2O3USERrbO-g2hN9FzKxTRv3kGjPerno5PBtIL0YoKcCh7MVqk=&c=hVxJkoucckJNRxikZcRIrEx-vy8Xeml2db_TFJWTQS8v2UWfnD1JyA==&ch=qQxXeUcCNbBDZRfleYBuxqNN4zOah2XuD1zbaVKu8BmhT7HY0kryIQ==).

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | == | Please see the below statement from Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler on the passing of former U.S. Senator Johnny Isakson: Senator Johnny Isakson leaves an indelible mark of service and grace on Georgia, the Senate and our country. God blessed our state with this tireless champion of building bridges, who dedicated his life to his faith, family, and community. In the Senate, I was honored at sit at his desk, which he signed, and was reminded of his powerful legacy that will inspire Georgians for generations to come. Jeff and I send our love and prayers to Dianne and the Isakson family. | == | | | | As we close out 2021, Greater Georgia is working hard to connect with voters and stay involved in local communities to ensure every Georgian knows their voices are heard and their votes count. Recently, our team visited with several conservative groups to discuss Greater Georgia's work to register and engage voters and to spread love and cheer this holiday season. View pictures below of team members dropping by the == and conducting a == with the 6th District chapter of the Association of Mature American Citizens. | == | == | | | A perfect way to get into the Christmas spirit is by giving back to your community, which is exactly what our Greater Georgia team members are doing. On Thursday, Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler == the Georgia Division of Children and Family Services to help organize gifts for the Clark's Christmas Kids toy drive. | == == | | == | Greater Georgia's work is critical to defending conservative values, and it will only be possible through the hard work and support of strong, grassroots volunteers. We need your help! -- Click == or the button below to find out how you can join the fight for conservative values. | | | == | | | | | | UPDATES: | INTERNSHIP PROGRAM Greater Georgia has officially launched an ==! We are recruiting interns to assist with voter registration and engagement. This opportunity will be great to learn the ropes of political organizing, including how to get out the vote, how to engage with voters in a variety of communities, and more. Possible areas of compensation include class credit, milage reimbursement, and cash incentives based on goal-oriented progress. If you or someone you know is interested, please contact Outreach Coordinator Terry Fye at terry@greatergeorgia.com with questions or to submit a completed application. The full internship application can be found ==. | | | == | | | | IN THE NEWS: | Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler Talks Greater Georgia's Results and Strategy on The Erick Erickson Show, The Morning XTRA Dec. 6-7, 2021 | == | Erick Erickson Show (Atlanta/National) Click == or the video to listen. "We've had over 1.5 million voter contacts, we've registered thousands of voters, we've been at 22,000 doors ... we've been instrumental in helping preserve a suburban seat in the State House ... [In House District 34], we were able to go in, drive up the turnout ... and we increased the margin of victory over Nov. 2020 for the Republican by six points." | == | The Morning XTRA (Atlanta) Click == or the video to listen. "We're building the ground game to mobilize voters, to make sure that they know what's at stake and to have the people on the ground across the state with their neighbors knocking on doors, waving signs, registering voters, mobilizing people who haven't maybe voted in a couple cycles, helping them understand the stakes ... It starts with election integrity. | Peter,

First, let me begin by introducing myself. **My name is Coby Eiss and I’m Josh Riley’s campaign manager.**

In the coming months, I’ll be sending updates about the state of our race and Josh’s time on the campaign trail. Working with him closely, I can promise no one is more passionate about putting your voice front and center and understanding the issues that are central to Upstate New Yorkers.

**That’s why I’m reaching out today.** Since it's the holiday season and folks are busy, we’re re-opening our priorities survey for _one more day._

[_**Josh would love to hear your thoughts, and the survey will only take 2 minutes of your time.
