name: Tom Fitton
subject: Chinese Abuse US Diplomats?
body: Biden Border Crisis Insanity... [INSIDE JW] U.S. DIPLOMATS CONCERNED ABOUT CHINA’S ‘ANAL SWAB’ COVID TESTING [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=26502&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj0xYk8xd0NCaE1aWSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] China seems to have been messing with our diplomats, and we’re digging up the details, which the Biden administration seems intent on concealing. We received eight pages [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=26483&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc3RhdGUtYW5hbC1jb3ZpZC10ZXN0cy0wMjExMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] of communications from the U.S. Department of State revealing concerns by the U.S. Embassy in Beijing that U.S. diplomatic personnel were being asked to submit to an anal swab COVID testing policy. The redacted documents show that at as many as two people were either asked or required to take an anal test for COVID by the Chinese government. We obtained the records in response to a FOIA lawsuit [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=26484&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGlwbG9tYXRzLWFuYWwtY292aWQtdGVzdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] against the State Department for non-identifying records of U.S. diplomatic personnel being subjected to invasive COVID-19 anal swab tests by the Chinese government (_Judicial Watch v U.S. Dept of State_ [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=25536&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGVwdC1vZi1zdGF0ZS1jaGluYS1jb3ZpZC10ZXN0aW5nLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMjExMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] (No. 1:21-cv-02111)). We sued after the State Department failed to respond to a June 18, 2021, FOIA request for: All records about US diplomatic personnel in or seeking to enter China being subjected to anal swab tests for the COVID-19 virus, including all complaints and communications regarding such testing. This request does not seek any personal identifying information of US diplomatic personnel that may have been subjected to such testing. On January 25, 2021, an unidentified general services officer in the U.S. Embassy, Beijing, sent emails [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=26486&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc3RhdGUtYW5hbC1jb3ZpZC10ZXN0cy0wMjExMS1wZy02Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] to personnel evidently under quarantine after traveling to China under the subject line “Testing Guidance:” Sorry for the strange questions, but I was directed by embassy management to survey our people and ensure we are not being asked to participate in the more invasive testing procedures. The sender also writes: There’s no good way to ask this, but has any health authority asked you or your spouse to conduct an anal swab test? The embassy obviously does not authorize or permit this type of testing on diplomats, but others have been asked so I need to verify everyone’s experience. The testers may also ask to do an “environmental test” where they enter the residence and swab drinking glasses, furniture, etc. This is also not permitted. They may swab the outside [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=26486&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc3RhdGUtYW5hbC1jb3ZpZC10ZXN0cy0wMjExMS1wZy02Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] of the doorknob, but nothing internal. [Emphasis in the original.] For the record, our agreement is for nasal and/or throat swabs only. If you are asked to undergo either of the above or any other that seems inappropriate, please refuse and contact us immediately. We will escalate to [China’s] MFA/FAO [foreign area officer] and go from there. One recipient responds [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=26487&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc3RhdGUtYW5hbC1jb3ZpZC10ZXN0cy0wMjExMS1wZy05Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] on January 26: No, I have had no unusual requests. I received a nasal and throat swab when I arrived in Shanghai and just a throat swab before departing. Beginning at 10:34 p.m. on January 26, 2021, another unidentified sender emails to an unidentified recipient under Subject Line, “Test:” [Redacted] please call me at your convenient time [redacted]. Below text message came from [redacted]. This is not good!” At 10:39, the recipient responds: This is becoming so non diplomatic status testing. Disgusting. I hope the GSO [general services officer] and VIP Beijing visits can do something about this. I am so disgusted right now. The sender responds at 11:49 a.m. the next day: “At this point, if they will insist the anal test, we would like to just go back to the States.” Another recipient of the original “Testing Guidance” email responds on January 26: “Thanks. I am hoping for a smooth covid test and release on Friday.” On January 26, an unidentified sender responds to the original “Test Guidance” email: That is indeed a very strange test and first time we’ve heard as well. Fortunately, the tests we had at the Shanghai airports was just nose swab and one at Shanghai hotel on our 14th day was just throat swab. Do you have a good number we can call that we will definitely get a response right away once they come in for the test on Friday, January 29th? Last Friday, I tried to call 9 to 10 a.m. to be connected to anyone in the VIP visits and no one answered the office number and the mobile number same thing when we got inside the LMQC unit at 2:30 I started calling to inquire more guidelines and I was not able to talk to anyone. The original sender of the “Test Guidance” email responds: Thanks for confirming. Generally speaking, try calling the Embassy main line and you can ask for my extension of [redacted]. If you can’t reach me, ask for the Duty Officer of GSO secretary. GSO isn’t setup for 24/7 call service, but if you reach a Duty Officer, you can ask for me or one of the other GSOs. On January 27, another recipient of the “Test Guidance [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=26489&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc3RhdGUtYW5hbC1jb3ZpZC10ZXN0cy0wMjExMS1wZy03L13igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM= email notifies his “team:” Team – FYI. [Redacted] being asked for anal swab and environmental test. Can Housing contact [redacted]? I’ll have VIP contact FAO ASAP. On March 4, a redacted sender emails [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=26490&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc3RhdGUtYW5hbC1jb3ZpZC10ZXN0cy0wMjExMS1wZy00Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] a redacted recipient in the State Department’s VIP Visits Section under the Subject Line, “Swabs, swabs, and more swabs” (citing a Reuters article): I hadn’t heard this rule before: Travelers flying into Shanghai must undertake a full battery of tests including anal swabs, if more than five people on their airplane test positive for the virus, state media reported, citing one of the local CDC staff. In response to this email, the recipient appears to email another person in the VIP Visits section about the new Chinese rule: This is certainly different and a variation on the “close contact” rule. VIP – please check with FAO again on this. Seems to be a CDC rule and given our history with close contacts and following hotel separations, want to make sure the MFA/FAO understand this is not acceptable for our people regardless of the reason. The recipient of this email responds [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=26491&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc3RhdGUtYW5hbC1jb3ZpZC10ZXN0cy0wMjExMS1wZy0zL106P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz “Just checked with Shanghai FAO, for in-bound diplomats who’re close contact to someone tested positive upon arrival, they will still quarantine in the Wyndham Hotel, but with one additional NAT test [Nucleic Acid Test]. On March 5, the VIP Visits sender emails the apparently same recipient: Just checked with my contact from the PEK [Beijing International Capital Airport] customs. Airport only does nasal swab and throat swab. According to some Chinese social media, international travelers are required to get anal tests during centralized quarantine. It could happen on Day 3, Day 7, Day 14 or Day 21. Some people were tested once and some were twice. Samples were collected by medical staff or travelers themselves or from a fecal sample. The recipient responds: Thanks [redacted]. Interesting that there’s no central policy on this given all the media attention and spin. Please keep me undated if anything changes. It took six months and a federal lawsuit to confirm that our embassy in Beijing was concerned about the Chinese government’s invasive anal swab and other COVID testing of our diplomatic personnel – at that as many as two people were asked to submit to a test. Our diplomatic personnel were harassed in a reprehensible way by the Chinese government, and the Biden administration seems to have done little in response – except to cover it up. U.S. INVESTS $1.5 MIL TO HELP SALVADORAN POLICE DEAL WITH COVID-19 STRESS Joe Biden and his leftist minders don't just have a carefree attitude toward the border. Rather, they seem intent on dismantling it. Witness their recent appointment of a new Customs and Border Protection commissioner who is a believer in sanctuary cities and whose appointment was a further blow [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=26503&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvYm9yZGVyLWFnZW50cy1zZW5hdGUtZGVtb2NyYXRzLWJpZGVuLWNicC1ub21pbmVlLWhhdGVkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] to the already law morale of border agents. But don’t worry about police morale. We’re taking care of that in ... El Salvador. Our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=26494&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdS1zLWdpdmVzLXNhbHZhZG9yYW4tcG9saWNlLTEtNS1taWxsaW9uLXRvLWRlYWwtd2l0aC1jb3ZpZC0xOS1zdHJlc3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] on this clown show: While local law enforcement agencies around the United States weather extensive budget cuts, the federal government is dedicating $1.5 million to assist police in El Salvador with challenges and stress created by COVID-19. The goal is to help the Central American nation’s 26,966-member National Civil Police (PNC) asses its role and capacities during a crisis and efficiently provide training to manage a public health emergency like the pandemic. “The training will particularly focus on public health orders, personal and workplace safety measures, education in regards to transmission and proper treatment, and management of operational continuity,” according to a grant announcement [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=26504&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ3JhbnRzLmdvdi93ZWIvZ3JhbnRzL3ZpZXctb3Bwb3J0dW5pdHkuaHRtbD9vcHBJZD0zMzY5MjkmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] made public this month. The document explains that in March 2020, the first case of COVID-19 was identified in El Salvador. With no immunity and no vaccine available to prevent infection in the impoverished country of about 6.5 million, COVID-19 has created challenges not only for the public health sector, but also for law enforcement agencies. To support Salvadoran law enforcement during the pandemic, American taxpayers will fund measures that will strengthen police programs to maintain control during lockdowns and enforce travel bans and social distancing rules. “The added support requirements created additional demands for security services and exposed police personnel to higher risk of infection,” the U.S. writes in the grant document. “In addition, because regular duties related to policing operations do not abate during the crisis, security sector personnel faced greater strain on resources and high levels of stress.” Money for the initiative will flow through the State Department’s Bureau of International Narcotics and Law Enforcement Affairs (INL), which was created in the late 70s to reduce drug trafficking into the U.S. from Latin America. In fiscal year 2022 the State Department requested $456.8 million [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=26505&F=T&] for INL programs it claims strengthen the rule of law, human rights protections, law enforcement capacity, anti-corruption activities, and other critical efforts around the globe. In this case the allocation will enhance El Salvador’s Ministry of Justice and Public Security’s capacity of preparedness for a public health crisis by efficiently providing essential public safety services, maintaining public order, and addressing additional challenges faced during such emergency. Among the requirements for grant recipients is that they identify stresses on officer wellness and police resources in the PNC, which stands for Policia National Civil in Spanish. Back home in the U.S. police departments are enduring major budget cuts as part of a leftist movement ignited by George Floyd’s May 2020 death in Minneapolis. In the last year more than a dozen cities slashed police funding [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=26506&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm9yYmVzLmNvbS9zaXRlcy9qZW1pbWFtY2V2b3kvMjAyMC8wOC8xMy9hdC1sZWFzdC0xMy1jaXRpZXMtYXJlLWRlZnVuZGluZy10aGVpci1wb2xpY2UtZGVwYXJ0bWVudHMvP3NoPTJhNWQ0YTUyOWUzZiZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] or decreased the number of officers, according to a probe conducted by a national news agency. They include the nation’s two largest cities—Los Angeles and New York—which eliminated $150 million and $1 billion respectively from their police budget. Other cities that drastically cut police funding include Austin, Seattle, San Francisco, Baltimore, Portland, Salt Lake City and Philadelphia. Washington D.C. decreased its police budget by $15 million. Predictably, there has been a rise in crime, motivating some cities to partially reverse police defunding. Even New York’s outgoing leftist mayor, Bill de Blasio, announced plans to reinstate [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=26507&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud3NqLmNvbS9hcnRpY2xlcy9jaXRpZXMtcmV2ZXJzZS1kZWZ1bmRpbmctdGhlLXBvbGljZS1hbWlkLXJpc2luZy1jcmltZS0xMTYyMjA2NjMwNz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] $92 million for a new precinct and Oakland Mayor Libby Schaaf recently said [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=26508&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hcG5ld3MuY29tL2FydGljbGUvYnVzaW5lc3MtY3JpbWUtcG9saWNlLXZpb2xlbmNlLWhvbWljaWRlLWNjZTQ2NzJlNGRlMGMyMDVhNzAzNjE0ZWUxMDEzMzZkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] she’ll work to reverse cuts to her city’s police department amid a spike in homicides and violence in the northern California city. At the federal level, money keeps flowing to questionable foreign and domestic law enforcement initiatives. That includes $200,000 to advance “gender equality” [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=26509&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdS1zLXBheXMtY29zdGEtcmljYS10by1oaXJlLW1vcmUtZmVtYWxlLWNvcHMtYXMtcG9saWNlLWF0LWhvbWUtZ2V0LWRlZnVuZGVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] in Costa Rica’s police forces by hiring more female cops. The funds also helped pay for the Central American nation’s first “institutional meeting of women leaders in gender matters” to help create a national agenda for the “empowerment of the police forces in the promotion of gender equity and prevention of gender violence in all its forms.” A few months ago a Clinton community policing program received $33 million [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57406&L=26510&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdS1zLWdpdmVzLWNsaW50b24tY29tbXVuaXR5LXBvbGljaW5nLXByb2dyYW0tMzMtbWlsLWFzLWRlcGFydG1lbnRzLWVuZHVyZS1mdW5kaW5nLWN1dHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] from the government to advance a nationwide effort that includes tolerance, diversity, and anti-bias training as well as crisis intervention teams and de-escalation training. Former President Bill Clinton created the program, known as Office of Community Oriented Policing Services (COPS), to support “creative” approaches to preventing crime and promoting safe communities. Until next week ... [INSIDE JW] U.S. DIPLOMATS CONCERNED ABOUT CHINA’S ‘ANAL SWAB’ COVID TESTING [==] China seems to have been messing with our diplomats, and we’re digging up the details, which the Biden administration seems intent on concealing. We received eight pages [=] of communications from the U.S. Department of State revealing concerns by the U.S. Embassy in Beijing that U.S. diplomatic personnel were being asked to submit to an anal swab COVID testing policy. The redacted documents show that at as many as two people were either asked or required to take an anal test for COVID by the Chinese government. We obtained the records in response to a FOIA lawsuit [=] against the State Department for non-identifying records of U.S. diplomatic personnel being subjected to invasive COVID-19 anal swab tests by the Chinese government (Judicial Watch v U.S. Dept of State [=] (No. 1:21-cv-02111)). We sued after the State Department failed to respond to a June 18, 2021, FOIA request for: All records about US diplomatic personnel in or seeking to enter China being subjected to anal swab tests for the COVID-19 virus, including all complaints and communications regarding such testing. This request does not seek any personal identifying information of US diplomatic personnel that may have been subjected to such testing. On January 25, 2021, an unidentified general services officer in the U.S. Embassy, Beijing, sent emails [==] to personnel evidently under quarantine after traveling to China under the subject line “Testing Guidance:” Sorry for the strange questions, but I was directed by embassy management to survey our people and ensure we are not being asked to participate in the more invasive testing procedures. The sender also writes: There’s no good way to ask this, but has any health authority asked you or your spouse to conduct an anal swab test? The embassy obviously does not authorize or permit this type of testing on diplomats, but others have been asked so I need to verify everyone’s experience. The testers may also ask to do an “environmental test” where they enter the residence and swab drinking glasses, furniture, etc. This is also not permitted. They may swab the outside [==] of the doorknob, but nothing internal. [Emphasis in the original.] For the record, our agreement is for nasal and/or throat swabs only. If you are asked to undergo either of the above or any other that seems inappropriate, please refuse and contact us immediately. We will escalate to [China’s] MFA/FAO [foreign area officer] and go from there. One recipient responds [==] on January 26: No, I have had no unusual requests. I received a nasal and throat swab when I arrived in Shanghai and just a throat swab before departing. Beginning at 10:34 p.m. on January 26, 2021, another unidentified sender emails to an unidentified recipient under Subject Line, “Test:” [Redacted] please call me at your convenient time [redacted]. Below text message came from [redacted]. This is not good!” At 10:39, the recipient responds: This is becoming so non diplomatic status testing. Disgusting. I hope the GSO [general services officer] and VIP Beijing visits can do something about this. I am so disgusted right now. The sender responds at 11:49 a.m. the next day: “At this point, if they will insist the anal test, we would like to just go back to the States.” Another recipient of the original “Testing Guidance” email responds on January 26: “Thanks. I am hoping for a smooth covid test and release on Friday.” On January 26, an unidentified sender responds to the original “Test Guidance” email: That is indeed a very strange test and first time we’ve heard as well. Fortunately, the tests we had at the Shanghai airports was just nose swab and one at Shanghai hotel on our 14th day was just throat swab. Do you have a good number we can call that we will definitely get a response right away once they come in for the test on Friday, January 29th? Last Friday, I tried to call 9 to 10 a.m. to be connected to anyone in the VIP visits and no one answered the office number and the mobile number same thing when we got inside the LMQC unit at 2:30 I started calling to inquire more guidelines and I was not able to talk to anyone. The original sender of the “Test Guidance” email responds: Thanks for confirming. Generally speaking, try calling the Embassy main line and you can ask for my extension of [redacted]. If you can’t reach me, ask for the Duty Officer of GSO secretary. GSO isn’t setup for 24/7 call service, but if you reach a Duty Officer, you can ask for me or one of the other GSOs. On January 27, another recipient of the “Test Guidance [= email notifies his “team:” Team – FYI. [Redacted] being asked for anal swab and environmental test. Can Housing contact [redacted]? I’ll have VIP contact FAO ASAP. On March 4, a redacted sender emails [==] a redacted recipient in the State Department’s VIP Visits Section under the Subject Line, “Swabs, swabs, and more swabs” (citing a Reuters article): I hadn’t heard this rule before: Travelers flying into Shanghai must undertake a full battery of tests including anal swabs, if more than five people on their airplane test positive for the virus, state media reported, citing one of the local CDC staff. In response to this email, the recipient appears to email another person in the VIP Visits section about the new Chinese rule: This is certainly different and a variation on the “close contact” rule. VIP – please check with FAO again on this. Seems to be a CDC rule and given our history with close contacts and following hotel separations, want to make sure the MFA/FAO understand this is not acceptable for our people regardless of the reason. The recipient of this email responds [ “Just checked with Shanghai FAO, for in-bound diplomats who’re close contact to someone tested positive upon arrival, they will still quarantine in the Wyndham Hotel, but with one additional NAT test [Nucleic Acid Test]. On March 5, the VIP Visits sender emails the apparently same recipient: Just checked with my contact from the PEK [Beijing International Capital Airport] customs. Airport only does nasal swab and throat swab. According to some Chinese social media, international travelers are required to get anal tests during centralized quarantine. It could happen on Day 3, Day 7, Day 14 or Day 21. Some people were tested once and some were twice. Samples were collected by medical staff or travelers themselves or from a fecal sample. The recipient responds: Thanks [redacted]. Interesting that there’s no central policy on this given all the media attention and spin. Please keep me undated if anything changes. It took six months and a federal lawsuit to confirm that our embassy in Beijing was concerned about the Chinese government’s invasive anal swab and other COVID testing of our diplomatic personnel – at that as many as two people were asked to submit to a test. Our diplomatic personnel were harassed in a reprehensible way by the Chinese government, and the Biden administration seems to have done little in response – except to cover it up. U.S. INVESTS $1.5 MIL TO HELP SALVADORAN POLICE DEAL WITH COVID-19 STRESS Joe Biden and his leftist minders don't just have a carefree attitude toward the border. Rather, they seem intent on dismantling it. Witness their recent appointment of a new Customs and Border Protection commissioner who is a believer in sanctuary cities and whose appointment was a further blow [] to the already law morale of border agents. But don’t worry about police morale. We’re taking care of that in ... El Salvador. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [] on this clown show: While local law enforcement agencies around the United States weather extensive budget cuts, the federal government is dedicating $1.5 million to assist police in El Salvador with challenges and stress created by COVID-19. The goal is to help the Central American nation’s 26,966-member National Civil Police (PNC) asses its role and capacities during a crisis and efficiently provide training to manage a public health emergency like the pandemic. “The training will particularly focus on public health orders, personal and workplace safety measures, education in regards to transmission and proper treatment, and management of operational continuity,” according to a grant announcement [=] made public this month. The document explains that in March 2020, the first case of COVID-19 was identified in El Salvador. With no immunity and no vaccine available to prevent infection in the impoverished country of about 6.5 million, COVID-19 has created challenges not only for the public health sector, but also for law enforcement agencies. To support Salvadoran law enforcement during the pandemic, American taxpayers will fund measures that will strengthen police programs to maintain control during lockdowns and enforce travel bans and social distancing rules. “The added support requirements created additional demands for security services and exposed police personnel to higher risk of infection,” the U.S. writes in the grant document. “In addition, because regular duties related to policing operations do not abate during the crisis, security sector personnel faced greater strain on resources and high levels of stress.” Money for the initiative will flow through the State Department’s Bureau of International Narcotics and Law Enforcement Affairs (INL), which was created in the late 70s to reduce drug trafficking into the U.S. from Latin America. In fiscal year 2022 the State Department requested $456.8 million [=] for INL programs it claims strengthen the rule of law, human rights protections, law enforcement capacity, anti-corruption activities, and other critical efforts around the globe. In this case the allocation will enhance El Salvador’s Ministry of Justice and Public Security’s capacity of preparedness for a public health crisis by efficiently providing essential public safety services, maintaining public order, and addressing additional challenges faced during such emergency. Among the requirements for grant recipients is that they identify stresses on officer wellness and police resources in the PNC, which stands for Policia National Civil in Spanish. Back home in the U.S. police departments are enduring major budget cuts as part of a leftist movement ignited by George Floyd’s May 2020 death in Minneapolis. In the last year more than a dozen cities slashed police funding [==] or decreased the number of officers, according to a probe conducted by a national news agency. They include the nation’s two largest cities—Los Angeles and New York—which eliminated $150 million and $1 billion respectively from their police budget. Other cities that drastically cut police funding include Austin, Seattle, San Francisco, Baltimore, Portland, Salt Lake City and Philadelphia. Washington D.C. decreased its police budget by $15 million. Predictably, there has been a rise in crime, motivating some cities to partially reverse police defunding. Even New York’s outgoing leftist mayor, Bill de Blasio, announced plans to reinstate [==] $92 million for a new precinct and Oakland Mayor Libby Schaaf recently said [] she’ll work to reverse cuts to her city’s police department amid a spike in homicides and violence in the northern California city. At the federal level, money keeps flowing to questionable foreign and domestic law enforcement initiatives. That includes $200,000 to advance “gender equality” [==] in Costa Rica’s police forces by hiring more female cops. The funds also helped pay for the Central American nation’s first “institutional meeting of women leaders in gender matters” to help create a national agenda for the “empowerment of the police forces in the promotion of gender equity and prevention of gender violence in all its forms.” A few months ago a Clinton community policing program received $33 million [] from the government to advance a nationwide effort that includes tolerance, diversity, and anti-bias training as well as crisis intervention teams and de-escalation training. Former President Bill Clinton created the program, known as Office of Community Oriented Policing Services (COPS), to support “creative” approaches to preventing crime and promoting safe communities. Until next week ... name: Mikayla Ridley
subject: A special healthcare message from a constituent of our campaign
disclaimer_text: paid for by public money, which means that most families would pay less overall
body:
| |
---
Peter, My name is Charlie, and I want Mikayla Ridley to represent me in Congress because she stands for the change that my district and the nation need to see. New York's 22nd District has some of the worst health outcomes in the state, and many families avoid going to the doctor because of high costs. We all know the challenges: You have to make sure a doctor takes your insurance, not to mention the difficulty getting a timely appointment. You have to consider co-pays, premiums, and deductibles. And you have to consider the cost of prescription medication. That's why Mikayla Ridley supports an overhaul of our failed healthcare system. She understands that healthcare is a human right, so she supports Medicare for All. With Medicare for All, you don't have to worry about whether or not a doctor takes your insurance; you can see any licensed practitioner. You wouldn't have to worry about premiums or deductibles, either; instead, healthcare would be paid for by public money, which means that most families would pay less overall. That system would relieve the rampant income inequality in our country and lead to fairness and better health outcomes for all. Our current system creates scary uncertainties and is designed to funnel money from Americans to the CEOs of private insurance companies. In the meantime, everyday people struggle to pay our bills and sometimes ration medicine because of high costs, and CEOs make tens of millions of dollars year after year. The Democratic Party doesn't ever take on Big Pharma and CEOs, but it must. The party needs people like Mikayla Ridley, who will fight for the rights and needs of NY-22 and all Americans. Please make your first or next donation to our grassroots campaign today. Thank you, Charlie

clean_body: | | Peter, My name is Charlie, and I want Mikayla Ridley to represent me in Congress because she stands for the change that my district and the nation need to see. New York's 22nd District has some of the worst health outcomes in the state, and many families avoid going to the doctor because of high costs. We all know the challenges: You have to make sure a doctor takes your insurance, not to mention the difficulty getting a timely appointment. You have to consider co-pays, premiums, and deductibles. And you have to consider the cost of prescription medication. That's why Mikayla Ridley supports an overhaul of our failed healthcare system. She understands that healthcare is a human right, so she supports Medicare for All. With Medicare for All, you don't have to worry about whether or not a doctor takes your insurance; you can see any licensed practitioner. You wouldn't have to worry about premiums or deductibles, either; instead, healthcare would be paid for by public money, which means that most families would pay less overall. That system would relieve the rampant income inequality in our country and lead to fairness and better health outcomes for all. Our current system creates scary uncertainties and is designed to funnel money from Americans to the CEOs of private insurance companies. In the meantime, everyday people struggle to pay our bills and sometimes ration medicine because of high costs, and CEOs make tens of millions of dollars year after year. The Democratic Party doesn't ever take on Big Pharma and CEOs, but it must. The party needs people like Mikayla Ridley, who will fight for the rights and needs of NY-22 and all Americans. Please make your first or next donation to our grassroots campaign today. Thank you, Charlie ~~ ~ Paid for by Mikayla Ridley for Congress | ~ "Facebook" ~ "Twitter" ~ "Instagram" P.O. Box 312 | 200 Washington Avenue | Endicott, NY 13761 |

Team — We cannot allow Republicans to ignore the needs of everyday Texans any longer. For eight years, Dan Patrick has manufactured crisis after crisis, refusing to solve the very real problems facing our state. And there is a cost to that negligence. From a failed power grid to a failed COVID response, Texans are paying with their lives and livelihoods. Don’t forget: Texans froze. Texans died. And Dan Patrick had the opportunity to do right by the people of our great state and deliver them a fully repaired, updated, and modernized energy grid in response. **Instead, he turned his back on the people of Texas while he and his mega-donors and corporate buddies made out like bandits — leaving middle-class families to carry the burden. ** Texans know they deserve a leader who will fight for them. That’s why the support for Mike and our people-powered movement is surging. We can win this race and hold Dan Patrick accountable, but only with your help. [**Add a donation to Mike Collier’s campaign for Lieutenant Governor of Texas and help send Dan Patrick packing next year. clean_body: | Team — We cannot allow Republicans to ignore the needs of everyday Texans any longer. For eight years, Dan Patrick has manufactured crisis after crisis, refusing to solve the very real problems facing our state. And there is a cost to that negligence. From a failed power grid to a failed COVID response, Texans are paying with their lives and livelihoods. Don’t forget: Texans froze. Texans died. And Dan Patrick had the opportunity to do right by the people of our great state and deliver them a fully repaired, updated, and modernized energy grid in response. Instead, he turned his back on the people of Texas while he and his mega-donors and corporate buddies made out like bandits — leaving middle-class families to carry the burden. Texans know they deserve a leader who will fight for them. That’s why the support for Mike and our people-powered movement is surging. We can win this race and hold Dan Patrick accountable, but only with your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Texas needs elected officials who will stand up for our state, not a weak politician who puts his own self-interest first. We deserve better, and that’s why your donation is so important. With your support, we can win, take back the office of the Lieutenant Governor, and put power back in the hands of the people. Thanks for standing with us. — Team Collier The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

name: Rick Larsen
subject: House Democrats lead the way
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39839516/321654751/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2RhZDAzOS1mYzYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dtbmYM563xALjyI5bm5q62q_k4lV0Y_Z_9tHqFrn5jk=&emci=c3607dd3-6e5f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f7dad039-fc60-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=9494239)
---

| | I know that politics can sometimes be frustrating to watch – _it is for me, too!_ – so **I thought I would share with you the highlights of what we accomplished in the House of Representatives this year.** House Democrats fought the pandemic and helped families and communities recover with the American Rescue Plan. The American Rescue Plan extended the child income tax credit, provided $1400 in direct payments to people, and added $300 of weekly unemployment benefits. The American Rescue Plan included a Small Business Opportunity Fund and emergency grants to small businesses, so Main Street wouldn't shut down while Wall Street prospered. All told, the American Rescue Plan provided thousands of dollars in direct relief to American families and workers. House Democrats combated the Republican effort to subvert democracy with historic bills to defend voting rights, expand access to the ballot, end gerrymandering, implement nationwide automatic voter registration, make Election Day a federal holiday, and stop the flood of dark money in our democracy. House Democrats made the largest investment in infrastructure since the Eisenhower Administration, including big investments to fight the climate crisis. The Bipartisan Infrastructure Law invests billions not just to repair our broken roads and bridges, but to make our critical infrastructure climate resilient. The new law also includes billions to combat the effects of climate change by cleaning up our most polluted communities. House Democrats passed a law protecting reproductive health care nationwide. The Women's Health Protection Act is the first time in U.S. history that the House has passed a bill guaranteeing the right to an abortion nationwide, a critical effort as we await the Supreme Court's decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_. House Democrats worked to make the criminal justice system more fair, equitable, and humane. We passed the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, which bans chokeholds and no-knock warrants. The bill also places meaningful limits on qualified immunity, making it easier to hold accountable police officers who use excessive force. And House Democrats passed Build Back Better, which will create millions of jobs, fight climate change, and reduce the cost of living for millions of American families – with lower prescription drug costs, Medicare hearing benefits, a $250-300/month child tax credit, provide free pre-K for all 3- and 4-year-olds in America, reduced child care costs, lower health care premiums, and the largest investment in affordable housing in history. (And it is all paid for with taxes on corporations that move jobs and hide money overseas, taxes on people who make over $10 million/year, and ensuring that people who make over $400,000/year actually pay the taxes they owe.) **this year it was House Democrats leading the way. That is what we were sent to Congress to do, and that is what we did.** And we are not letting up. There is still a lot to do next year to keep making progress on behalf of our families, our communities, and our country. And next year, Democrats face an uphill battle to keep our majority in the House. But we are organizing now, and getting ready to win the big election fights so that we can protect all we have accomplished and keep up the pressure on the Senate and the White House to get the job done. clean_body: | | | I know that politics can sometimes be frustrating to watch – it is for me, too! – so I thought I would share with you the highlights of what we accomplished in the House of Representatives this year. House Democrats fought the pandemic and helped families and communities recover with the American Rescue Plan. The American Rescue Plan extended the child income tax credit, provided $1400 in direct payments to people, and added $300 of weekly unemployment benefits. The American Rescue Plan included a Small Business Opportunity Fund and emergency grants to small businesses, so Main Street wouldn't shut down while Wall Street prospered. All told, the American Rescue Plan provided thousands of dollars in direct relief to American families and workers. House Democrats combated the Republican effort to subvert democracy with historic bills to defend voting rights, expand access to the ballot, end gerrymandering, implement nationwide automatic voter registration, make Election Day a federal holiday, and stop the flood of dark money in our democracy. House Democrats made the largest investment in infrastructure since the Eisenhower Administration, including big investments to fight the climate crisis. The Bipartisan Infrastructure Law invests billions not just to repair our broken roads and bridges, but to make our critical infrastructure climate resilient. The new law also includes billions to combat the effects of climate change by cleaning up our most polluted communities. House Democrats passed a law protecting reproductive health care nationwide. The Women's Health Protection Act is the first time in U.S. history that the House has passed a bill guaranteeing the right to an abortion nationwide, a critical effort as we await the Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. House Democrats worked to make the criminal justice system more fair, equitable, and humane. We passed the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, which bans chokeholds and no-knock warrants. The bill also places meaningful limits on qualified immunity, making it easier to hold accountable police officers who use excessive force. And House Democrats passed Build Back Better, which will create millions of jobs, fight climate change, and reduce the cost of living for millions of American families – with lower prescription drug costs, Medicare hearing benefits, a $250-300/month child tax credit, provide free pre-K for all 3- and 4-year-olds in America, reduced child care costs, lower health care premiums, and the largest investment in affordable housing in history. (And it is all paid for with taxes on corporations that move jobs and hide money overseas, taxes on people who make over $10 million/year, and ensuring that people who make over $400,000/year actually pay the taxes they owe.) this year it was House Democrats leading the way. That is what we were sent to Congress to do, and that is what we did. And we are not letting up. There is still a lot to do next year to keep making progress on behalf of our families, our communities, and our country. And next year, Democrats face an uphill battle to keep our majority in the House. But we are organizing now, and getting ready to win the big election fights so that we can protect all we have accomplished and keep up the pressure on the Senate and the White House to get the job done. I appreciate your support. name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: My Official Decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
I've officially made a decision about my plans for the upcoming election.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?33u5t--fgxr-4qqlpo7&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-33u5t-1pxss-4qqlpo4/)
---

As one of our top supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made an official decision about my plans for the upcoming election:

**I started CAVPAC, and I'm 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022. I'm focusing all my efforts on pushing our America First conservatives to victory and defeating the radical Left.**

I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I’m traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and hold the Democrats accountable for their many failures.**

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines hoping things get better, I’m staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-33u5t-1pxst-4qqlpo5/ "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-33u5t-1pxsu-4qqlpo6/)
---

My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **

That’s why I am hoping you will **[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-33u5t-1pxsv-4qqlpo7/ "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.")** The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-33u5t-1pxsw-4qqlpo8/)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-33u5t-1pxsx-4qqlpo9/)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION **to **29910**
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-33u5t-1pxsy-4qqlpo0/ "Mike Pompeo is Calling on All Conservatives")
---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to **WIN BIG** for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. **[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-33u5t-1pxsz-4qqlpo1/ "Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

name: Jessie Thornton
subject: Did you see Derek’s email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
It's Jessie here, Finance Director for Derek Marshall's insurgent campaign for Congress. I wanted to check in and make sure you saw Derek's email a couple days ago. **At this point we only have ONE WEEK left until Christmas when donations will start to seriously dry up** as people focus their time and energy on their loved ones and their resources on holiday gifts. With days off for our team to celebrate Christmas and New Year’s, **we only have EIGHT DAYS left when we can fundraise. **
**This is arguably the most important time of the year for our campaign, one that will determine how much cash on hand we'll have when we enter our Election Year.** Every donation we receive gets us closer to our December fundraising goal and prepares us for what will undoubtedly be a tough and competitive race.
**[But there’s still time to support our campaign one more time before the end of our first year. Will you chip in today and help fund our mission to defeat Trump-backed Republican Jay Obernolte and flip this district from red to blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39839718/321656571/-1797803949?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDhjNTFlNS1mZDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ikw30e-gDQcPHn6OtsZKXIdvqcP2rs-qKMQCN8TmxsI=)**

In solidarity,
**Jessie Thornton**
Finance Director, Derek Marshall for Congress
——————————————————————————————————————————————————
Peter,
I have good news: so far, so good! We’re on track to reach our December goal and end the financial quarter AND year on a high note. **But there’s one thing we have to keep in mind: in 9 days it will be Christmas and donations will dry up** as people rightfully prioritize their time with family and friends and save their money for gifts, foods, and holiday travel.
**What that means for us is that we have about 10 real days left in the month when we can realistically fundraise, including today.** I’m reaching out to you personally to make a direct appeal. This is our most important fundraising deadline of the year, the one that will have the biggest impact on our cash on hand reserves going into the new year.
**[I’m asking you personally if you will contribute to our campaign and invest in the machine we’re building to flip this district from red to blue in 2022. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39839720/321656573/-1797803949?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDhjNTFlNS1mZDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ikw30e-gDQcPHn6OtsZKXIdvqcP2rs-qKMQCN8TmxsI=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39839729/321656579/-1797803949?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDhjNTFlNS1mZDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ikw30e-gDQcPHn6OtsZKXIdvqcP2rs-qKMQCN8TmxsI=)
We’ve had an incredible year and I’m unbelievably proud of everything my team and I have achieved over the past 12 months. It’s hard to believe that the year has flown by so fast. But almost $350,000 later, I know that this race is not just viable, but truly winnable. **Every single penny of that money has come from individual donors like yourself, who have given to this campaign because they believe in our vision for California’s 8th and the nation itself. **
Starting in January, everything will speed up. I will be spending more time engaging voters, connecting with community leaders, and starting up our field program. That means fundraising now is even more important. **We’ll be paying more staff, expanding our field, political, and communication programs, and preparing for a competitive general election.** Every single dollar counts.
**[That’s why your donation today could not be more important. Will you chip in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39839738/321656591/-1797803949?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDhjNTFlNS1mZDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ikw30e-gDQcPHn6OtsZKXIdvqcP2rs-qKMQCN8TmxsI=)**
In solidarity,

**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-08

clean_body: Peter, It's Jessie here, Finance Director for Derek Marshall's insurgent campaign for Congress. I wanted to check in and make sure you saw Derek's email a couple days ago. At this point we only have ONE WEEK left until Christmas when donations will start to seriously dry up as people focus their time and energy on their loved ones and their resources on holiday gifts. With days off for our team to celebrate Christmas and New Year’s, we only have EIGHT DAYS left when we can fundraise. This is arguably the most important time of the year for our campaign, one that will determine how much cash on hand we'll have when we enter our Election Year. Every donation we receive gets us closer to our December fundraising goal and prepares us for what will undoubtedly be a tough and competitive race. = In solidarity, Jessie Thornton Finance Director, Derek Marshall for Congress —————————————————————————————————————————————————— Peter, I have good news: so far, so good! We’re on track to reach our December goal and end the financial quarter AND year on a high note. But there’s one thing we have to keep in mind: in 9 days it will be Christmas and donations will dry up as people rightfully prioritize their time with family and friends and save their money for gifts, foods, and holiday travel. What that means for us is that we have about 10 real days left in the month when we can realistically fundraise, including today. I’m reaching out to you personally to make a direct appeal. This is our most important fundraising deadline of the year, the one that will have the biggest impact on our cash on hand reserves going into the new year. = = We’ve had an incredible year and I’m unbelievably proud of everything my team and I have achieved over the past 12 months. It’s hard to believe that the year has flown by so fast. But almost $350,000 later, I know that this race is not just viable, but truly winnable. Every single penny of that money has come from individual donors like yourself, who have given to this campaign because they believe in our vision for California’s 8th and the nation itself. Starting in January, everything will speed up. I will be spending more time engaging voters, connecting with community leaders, and starting up our field program. That means fundraising now is even more important. We’ll be paying more staff, expanding our field, political, and communication programs, and preparing for a competitive general election. Every single dollar counts. = In solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-08 * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: A Whitmer-Defeated New Year!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
The heartbeat of Michigan is its citizenry, and I am proud to be a born-and-raised Michigander. | | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter:

It’s hard to believe that we’re at the last weekend before Christmas. Yet, here we are. Detroit Metro and other Michigan airports are innundated with travelers heading to see their loved ones, and the roads will soon be full of holiday travelers as well.

I continue to criss-cross this amazing state of ours — with well over 1 million miles driven on Michigan highways.
---
|
---
---
|
---
| As I talk with folks throughout the state, **I’m continually reminded how resilient and amazing our fellow Michiganders are.** We’ve weathered...
* ridiculous _lock downs and mask mandates_ ,
* high taxes,
* reckless government spending,
* _terrible roads_ and bridges,
* onerous business regulations,
* failing schools,
* increasing _crime_ ,
* and more.

And yet, we’re still here. We’re still an incredible state, with incredible people. We have amazing entrepreneurs and innovators, dedicated and talented teachers, inspiring clergy members, hard-working plumbers, electricians, auto-workers, and so many more. **The heartbeat of Michigan is its citizenry, and _I am proud to be a born-and-raised Michigander_.**

When I launched my campaign for Governor, I did it with a sincere heart knowing that **my years of law enforcement leadership experience have prepared me for the job. I've excelled at putting together teams to tackle dangerous and challenging situations.** _That's the kind of leadership I believe we need_ in this state – someone who can pull together the best and the brightest to fix what Whitmer broke.
---
|
---
---
| I’m certainly not a poll-tested politician, or a johnny one note activist. I’m a hard working regular guy who has spent his entire career in service to this state and nation — first in the Marine Corps and then with the Michigan State Police.

Peter, I’m not sending a desperate plea for campaign funds to meet some phantom deadline or goal. _But I am sincerely asking if my message of hope for a return to a prosperous and great Michigan has resonated with you, that you would consider becoming part of our team_.

[Volunteer](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=1cec0e275e&e=0636b97700), _[make a donation,](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=160473d430&e=0636b97700)_ tell your friends.

Gretchen Whitmer and her cronies will be spending whatever they can to spread lies and gloss over her failed record. Already one “independent” group has launched ads supporting her.

_Working together, we can send Gretchen Whitmer back home and restore some true leadership to Lansing._

**Will you join me? **

Wishing you and your family a joyous and Merry Christmas, and a prosperous Whitmer-defeated New Year.

Sincerely, Michael Brown
Republican for Governor
---
|
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=bf640d1cca&e=0636b97700 "DONATE TODAY")
---
|

body:

_Congratulations!_
Hello Peter,
Because of your recent survey responses, petition signatures, and grassroots contributions, you have been officially marked in the **Top 3%** of ALL Trump supporters nationwide. Your dedicated support for President Trump and our America first movement has truly been an inspiration.
As a small token of our appreciation, we're offering a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity...

**The Senate is broken, and we can’t let any one senator stand in the way of progress like the Build Back Better Act. We have to expand our Senate majority. **

This is a once-in-a-generation piece of legislation, and if I were in the Senate I would fight like hell to make sure it passed.

That's why I'm here today personally asking you – **will you support my campaign to become the 50th vote Democrats need in the Senate to pass critical legislation like the Build Back Better Act?**

**The Build Back Better Act could do so much for everyday Americans:**

– It could provide the largest funding increase to Medicaid since its creation, expand Medicare and reduce the cost of prescription drugs.
– It could help support more than 17 million low-wage workers.
– It could make the single largest investment in affordable housing in history.
– It could represent the largest effort to combat climate change in American history.

And so much more. **This kind of legislation is what more than 81 million Americans voted for last year – but too many of our elected officials continue to stand in the way.**

I promise you, I'll fight for – and vote for – this progress every single day as your next U.S. senator.

**But I can't get there without your help.[Please, will you make a donation to my campaign right now to send another Democrat to the U.S. Senate who will fight for everyday Americans and secure President Biden's Senate majority for two more years?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39840720/321661483/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2000-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWViMWFlNy0wNDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gyehke7HvVryb2D11d-1mutYNBP7R3ktqSFLNLpac6A=)**

That's why I'm here today personally asking you – will you support my campaign to become the 50th vote Democrats need in the Senate to pass critical legislation like the Build Back Better Act? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = The Build Back Better Act could do so much for everyday Americans: – It could provide the largest funding increase to Medicaid since its creation, expand Medicare and reduce the cost of prescription drugs. – It could help support more than 17 million low-wage workers. – It could make the single largest investment in affordable housing in history. – It could represent the largest effort to combat climate change in American history. And so much more. This kind of legislation is what more than 81 million Americans voted for last year – but too many of our elected officials continue to stand in the way. I promise you, I'll fight for – and vote for – this progress every single day as your next U.S. senator. But I can't get there without your help.= | | = | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. name: Carole King
subject: a favor to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211219-CaroleKing-ExpandMajority-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211219-CaroleKing-ExpandMajority-Pros-sl1&akid=2358%2E9716520%2ESIHdsw)
| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211219-CaroleKing-ExpandMajority-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211219-CaroleKing-ExpandMajority-Pros-sl1&akid=2358%2E9716520%2ESIHdsw)
---

Hi, it’s Carole King. I hope you’re enjoying the holiday season and getting to spend it with loved ones.

I’m reaching out to you today to reflect on the past year. We’ve accomplished so much since we took back the Senate from Mitch McConnell and his dark money machine. This year alone, Democrats have:

* Delivered CRITICAL pandemic relief
* Passed a HISTORIC infrastructure bill
* Cut taxes for over 35 MILLION families
* Created millions of good-paying jobs AND brought the economy back to life.

**WE made this possible!**

Even with the slimmest possible majority and Republicans refusing to vote for bills that Democrats were FOR, Democrats solved many of the problems that kept folks up at night.

**Imagine how much MORE our Democrats could do for you and your family with an expanded majority!**

Even better than imagining is DOING—and we can all start DOING right now if we pitch in $5.

[**I’m teaming up with the DSCC to support their goal of expanding our Senate majority. Will you join this great team with a $5 contribution?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211219-CaroleKing-ExpandMajority-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211219-CaroleKing-ExpandMajority-Pros-sl1&akid=2358%2E9716520%2ESIHdsw)

Democrats have done so much already, but they don’t stop and say “That’s good enough.” Democrats want to keep moving us forward, while Republicans conspire to hold us back.

**Mitch McConnell literally called himself the “grim reaper" of the Senate. Why would any American want a “grim reaper” in charge of his or her future?**

That's the difference. Democrats went to bat for the American people and are eager to do more. The once-Grand Old Party is now the party of McConnell and Trump.

Republicans want to take us back to a time when there was a lot more suffering than most people knew about. And even as I write this, Republicans are denying longstanding rights to more than half the American people.

[**That’s why we’ve got to participate in the 2022 election with an even more fierce urgency than we did in 2020. And that’s why I’m doing my part to help Democrats win the Senate decisively in 2022. Will you join me in contributing $5?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211219-CaroleKing-ExpandMajority-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211219-CaroleKing-ExpandMajority-Pros-sl1&akid=2358%2E9716520%2ESIHdsw)

Democrats have a lot of accomplishments to run on, but Mitch McConnell has a crushing amount of cash on hand. Some of it comes from undisclosed big donors, and some of it comes from people who believe Republicans’ outlandish false claims and conspiracy theories that inspire hatred for Democrats as “the other.”

Republicans have no plan other than regaining control.

Democrats are determined to fight fear, hatred, and anger with accomplishments and a forward-looking approach to solving problems like food on the table, child care, and how to pay for their family's medical needs. I’m asking you to join me in helping the DSCC win _decisively_ and show Republicans just how badly they’re misjudging the people they were elected to help.

**Now’s the time to make our dreams happen—not just for Democrats but also for our Republican neighbors who share those dreams—and that starts with ensuring that the DSCC has the resources to elect Democrats in _all_ our key states and expand our majority!**

[**Will you join me in helping Democrats win decisively in the Senate so they can accomplish even more for you and your family? Will you stand with me and the DSCC? Click here to chip in!**](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211219-CaroleKing-ExpandMajority-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211219-CaroleKing-ExpandMajority-Pros-sl1&akid=2358%2E9716520%2ESIHdsw)
If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=11&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211219-CaroleKing-ExpandMajority-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211219-CaroleKing-ExpandMajority-Pros-sl1&akid=2358%2E9716520%2ESIHdsw)
---

---
| [Donate $25](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=13&amount=25&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211219-CaroleKing-ExpandMajority-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211219-CaroleKing-ExpandMajority-Pros-sl1&akid=2358%2E9716520%2ESIHdsw)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=14&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211219-CaroleKing-ExpandMajority-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211219-CaroleKing-ExpandMajority-Pros-sl1&akid=2358%2E9716520%2ESIHdsw)
---

Thank you for all you do every day to make the world a better place. Don’t be discouraged. Stay well, be strong, and believe that we can do it, and we’ll get 'er done.

I wish you and your family all the best in 2022. Happy New Year!

-Carole

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211219-CaroleKing-ExpandMajority-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211219-CaroleKing-ExpandMajority-Pros-sl1&akid=2358%2E9716520%2ESIHdsw)Carole King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award, a Kennedy Center Honor, and double-induction into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. Now Carole is using her platform to help elect an expanded Democratic Senate majority in 2022. And yes, Carole really did write this email.

We’ve accomplished so much since we took back the Senate from Mitch McConnell and his dark money machine. This year alone, Democrats have: Delivered CRITICAL pandemic relief Passed a HISTORIC infrastructure bill Cut taxes for over 35 MILLION families Created millions of good-paying jobs AND brought the economy back to life. WE made this possible! Even with the slimmest possible majority and Republicans refusing to vote for bills that Democrats were FOR, Democrats solved many of the problems that kept folks up at night. Imagine how much MORE our Democrats could do for you and your family with an expanded majority! Even better than imagining is DOING—and we can all start DOING right now if we pitch in $5. Democrats have done so much already, but they don’t stop and say “That’s good enough.” Democrats want to keep moving us forward, while Republicans conspire to hold us back. Mitch McConnell literally called himself the “grim reaper" of the Senate. Why would any American want a “grim reaper” in charge of his or her future? That's the difference. Democrats went to bat for the American people and are eager to do more. The once-Grand Old Party is now the party of McConnell and Trump. Republicans want to take us back to a time when there was a lot more suffering than most people knew about. And even as I write this, Republicans are denying longstanding rights to more than half the American people. Democrats have a lot of accomplishments to run on, but Mitch McConnell has a crushing amount of cash on hand. Some of it comes from undisclosed big donors, and some of it comes from people who believe Republicans’ outlandish false claims and conspiracy theories that inspire hatred for Democrats as “the other.” Republicans have no plan other than regaining control. Democrats are determined to fight fear, hatred, and anger with accomplishments and a forward-looking approach to solving problems like food on the table, child care, and how to pay for their family's medical needs. I’m asking you to join me in helping the DSCC win decisively and show Republicans just how badly they’re misjudging the people they were elected to help. Now’s the time to make our dreams happen—not just for Democrats but also for our Republican neighbors who share those dreams—and that starts with ensuring that the DSCC has the resources to elect Democrats in all our key states and expand our majority! If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | Thank you for all you do every day to make the world a better place. Don’t be discouraged. Stay well, be strong, and believe that we can do it, and we’ll get 'er done. I wish you and your family all the best in 2022. Happy New Year! -Carole King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award, a Kennedy Center Honor, and double-induction into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. Now Carole is using her platform to help elect an expanded Democratic Senate majority in 2022. And yes, Carole really did write this email. | | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | ** | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

Hello Tom Nelson supporter!

My name is Dan Bostrom and I was the very fortunate winner of Tom's Packers-Bears contest! I wanted to thank Tom for giving me this opportunity and to explain why Tom is the best person to beat Ron Johnson next fall.

One of the first things that comes through about Tom is his integrity. He has a true passion for serving the people of Wisconsin. He cares for his constituents and understands that being a public servant means listening and making a difference.

At the game, we sat next to two retired teachers from Appleton. Not only had Tom already knocked on their door in a previous campaign (!), we also talked about the goal that all of us share: beating Ron Johnson in 2022.

Tom Nelson is the candidate to beat Ron Johnson. I know that for sure and I hope you all do too. Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Tony
P.S. I'm sharing this message from my wife, Lauren, to show you what this campaign means to us.
* * *

I know it’s usually my husband Tony asking you for money.
But today, I told Tony I’d be the one to ask, and explain what this campaign means to us.
[**_So, yes -- I’m about to ask for $10 before midnight. Let me explain why. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39841576/321669089/1129282168?refcode=20211219_em_fr_b1_tl_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGMyNzVhZS0wZTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6JAPL7orl0DcI6iUmuDMS75ESWKs2MJUw4IDO0grDWQ=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39841577/321669090/1129282168?refcode=20211219_em_fr_b1_tl_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGMyNzVhZS0wZTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6JAPL7orl0DcI6iUmuDMS75ESWKs2MJUw4IDO0grDWQ=)
I know Tony can flip this seat for Democrats:

**[One of the things I admire most about Tony is that when he believes in something, he doesn’t stop until he gets the job done.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39841578/321669092/1129282168?refcode=20211219_em_fr_b1_tl_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGMyNzVhZS0wZTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6JAPL7orl0DcI6iUmuDMS75ESWKs2MJUw4IDO0grDWQ=)**

When he ran for the state Legislature, Tony fought for his principles against all odds.

When local businesses were struggling due to the pandemic, Tony secured relief funding.

When Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19, Tony demanded safer working conditions for essential workers like my father-in-law.

And when Republican Congressman Don Bacon favored tax cuts for billionaires and voted against COVID relief:

[**Tony stepped up to unseat him.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39841579/321669093/1129282168?refcode=20211219_em_fr_b1_tl_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGMyNzVhZS0wZTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6JAPL7orl0DcI6iUmuDMS75ESWKs2MJUw4IDO0grDWQ=)

[**_Everyday folks deserve a fighting chance, but my husband’s opponent doesn’t have the interests of our community at heart. Tony is determined to win this race, but it won’t be easy -- or cheap. Don Bacon already has a $260,000 fundraising lead. That’s why Tony needs to raise another $11,056 before midnight, and why I said I’d ask you today on his behalf. Will you chip in $10 to help him close this gap? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39841581/321669094/1129282168?refcode=20211219_em_fr_b1_tl_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGMyNzVhZS0wZTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6JAPL7orl0DcI6iUmuDMS75ESWKs2MJUw4IDO0grDWQ=)

It’s rooted in the lessons he learned as a public school teacher, working with kids like him.

And it’s rooted in his desire to leave the world a better place for our kids, Ava and Luca.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

we have some decisions to make — specifically about our 15 County Plan...
#

Friends —
In a little over a week, we’re going to close the books on our final, and most important fundraising deadline of the year.
And when we do, we’ll have some decisions to make — specifically about our 15 County Plan.
Right now, we’re short of where we need to be at this point in the month, and because of the importance of campaigning in every part of Arizona, we’d really hate to cut parts of this budget.
But we’ll only be able to run the plan if we have the resources, and that is why we’re asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution before our FEC fundraising deadline ends and we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers? We’ll put your donation to work on our 15 County Plan reaching the voters Mark needs to WIN.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?refcode=em211219-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1827_6688874_Bx17MW&akid=1827%2E6688874%2EBx17MW)

All of my GOP opponents are multi-millionaires. Billionaire tech giant Peter Thiel has propped up JD Vance with a $10 million super PAC. And Josh Mandel is a dangerous Trump-wannabe with his own share of Twitter rants.
