clean_body: | Derek — This morning, the former president went on Fox News to not only spread a new conspiracy theory, but also call for me to be thrown out of Congress and prosecuted: “He should be thrown out of Congress. And he should be thrown out of Congress and also prosecuted for what he said about me.” = I’m not going to respond to each of the former president’s falsehoods about me. It would simply take too much of my time. But they are lies. From a small and desperate man. Here’s the truth: Trump solicited Russian help in his first election, used it, and then lied to cover it up. He then tried to coerce Ukraine’s help in the next election by withholding hundreds of millions in military aid until they agreed to smear Joe Biden. He lost that election, and tried to overturn the results. And when that didn’t work, he incited an insurrection at the Capitol. Now he wants to remove from office anyone who will stand up to him. And have them prosecuted. Just like a despot. Already, Republicans are threatening to remove me from my committees in 2022 if they take over the House. And Trump’s latest comments will only intensify those false attacks on me and our work. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for always having my back. Especially with these vile threats. — Adam Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Olive Ave. Suite 208 Burbank, CA 91502 United States

name: AJ Braverman, Team Matt and Cynthia
subject: Can you chip in before we head into 2022?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
Hi —

I’m AJ, the Deputy Campaign Manager for Matt and Cynthia’s historic
campaign to reshape the state government of Rhode Island.

It’s been really inspiring to be with Matt and Cynthia the past few weeks
at #SleepOutRI. We built a movement. And won real change.

Communities across Rhode Island joined together in solidarity with our
neighbors experiencing homelessness, and despite the cold conditions, the
air feels electric with hope.

That’s the power of organizing. When we organize, we build
power. And when we lift up our voices together to demand safety and
dignity for all, we can force the corrupt establishment to listen. Now, we
need your help to sustain our organizing work into 2022.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/2945?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211219_AM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=327%2E43343%2ED5ohi6 ]We’re just a few short weeks away from the most important fundraising
deadline this campaign has seen yet. Will you add a donation to put us in
the strongest position possible as we head into the election year?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3162?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211219_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=327%2E43343%2ED5ohi6 ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3163?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211219_AM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=327%2E43343%2ED5ohi6 ]CHIP IN $27 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3164?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211219_AM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=327%2E43343%2ED5ohi6 ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3165?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211219_AM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=327%2E43343%2ED5ohi6 ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3166?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211219_AM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=327%2E43343%2ED5ohi6 ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/2945?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211219_AM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=327%2E43343%2ED5ohi6 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

We’re fighting for a Green New Deal for Rhode Island, for racial justice,
for housing affordability — and grassroots contributions power our work,
help us organize and keep moving forward.

We’re making history, and I’m so excited to have you on board.

Thanks,

AJ Braverman
Deputy Campaign Manager
Matt and Cynthia for Rhode Island

PO Box 2574 Providence, RI 02906

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Their priorities are all wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The Senate has time for bloated military spending but not Build Back Better.
#
Peter,
Last week, two big things happened in the Senate:
1. **They passed an excessive, bloated military budget of $768,000,000,000.** That’s even more than Trump’s last defense budget. It’s a giveaway to defense contractors. And it’s just wrong.
2. **They further delayed Build Back Better and investments in working people, families, and our communities.** That means delaying historic funding for child care, paid leave, climate action, housing, education, health care, and more.

What is the message the Senate is sending people across America when it has time to pass a bloated Pentagon budget, but fails to act with urgency on Build Back Better? The message is that giveaways to defense contractors and corporations are more important than investing in the people.
The message is that a military spending bill that is larger than Trump’s last Pentagon budget is more important than fighting climate change, securing universal pre-K, paid family and medical leave, affordable child care, and Medicare expansion, and investing in affordable housing, health care, home care, and immigration reform. The Senate can’t turn its back on these urgent issues. They need to get their priorities in order.
The House did our work, and now it’s time for the Senate to do theirs. Millions of working people and families across America are depending on us. The Senate can’t leave them behind. It’s time to deliver.
[**Our urgent work to CUT military spending, pass Build Back Better, and enact voting rights legislation needs your support, Peter. Can you chip in $3 towards our fight for what the people, our families, and our communities desperately need?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9049?refcode=em20211219-888&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=888%2E420207%2ElZt5IM)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9049?refcode=em20211219-888&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=888%2E420207%2ElZt5IM)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211219-888-footer&t=21&refcode2=888_420207_lZt5IM&akid=888%2E420207%2ElZt5IM)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

| | Peter —

Lori Saine is back at it again, and, unfortunately, it’s important that we talk about it. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Mortensen's Bill Makes Ivermectin Available to You
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mortensen_s_ivermectin_bill&n=1)
---
December 19th, 2021
## Mortensen Bill Makes Ivermectin an Over-the-Counter Drug
Rep Erik Mortensen has drafted a bill that will make Ivermectin available to you by becoming an over-the-counter drug. It's safe, cheap to make and appears to be effective at treating early symptoms of COVID. But the medical bureaucracy and media is doing everything they can to keep it out of your hands. In fact, if you can find a doctor to prescribe Ivermectin to you, pharmacies across Minnesota won't fill those prescriptions. That's insane! We need this legislation to pass when the legislature reconvenes on January 31st of 2022. You can learn more about Rep Erik Mortensen by visiting **[mortforhouse.com](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=V4aZFzq5K-w4VJa-OkXRhVPcW930IjQy8rXc-C8epyo&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mortensen_s_ivermectin_bill&n=2)**.
* * *
## Patriots Come Together to Support Lisa Hanson's Family After Storm
Last week's wind storm took out a barn and many trees at Vern and Lisa Hanson's home outside of Albert Lea. As you know, Lisa is currently sitting in jail for opening her business in defiance of Governor Walz' Emergency Orders. Thanks to organizer Keith Haskell, [over 50 patriots from around the state showed up](https://www.action4liberty.com/patriots_come_together_to_support_lisa_hanson_s_family_after_storm?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mortensen_s_ivermectin_bill&n=3) to help. And **thanks to your generous support** , we were able to buy lunch for the crew. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/patriots_come_together_to_support_lisa_hanson_s_family_after_storm?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mortensen_s_ivermectin_bill&n=4) **Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mortensen_s_ivermectin_bill&n=5 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mortensen_s_ivermectin_bill&n=5)
---

You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mortensen_s_ivermectin_bill&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mortensen_s_ivermectin_bill&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Humbling
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
When I first decided to run for the United States Senate, I wasn’t sure what to expect.
#

Friends -
When I first decided to run for the United States Senate, I wasn’t sure what to expect.
Yes, I have run for statewide office before and won twice, but this is an even bigger type of contest. These Senate races are just so expensive.
But then, literally MINUTES after I announced, Adam, a student from Morgantown chipped in $25. Not two minutes later, a higher ed administrator from Winston-Salem gave $100. In the next minute, Anna from Durham, a social worker, gave $50... and we were off.
Since then almost 20,000 people have chipped into my campaign. It’s humbling.
But with our FEC fundraising deadline just days away, we have our biggest challenge to-date in this race. And it’s why I have to ask:
**[I am humbly asking if you can PLEASE make your first $3 contribution to my campaign before our final FEC fundraising deadline before the election year comes to an end. This is so important.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211219-2-a&refcode2=156.357359.5gZpoE&t=1&akid=156%2E357359%2E5gZpoE)**

clean_body: When I first decided to run for the United States Senate, I wasn’t sure what to expect. Friends - When I first decided to run for the United States Senate, I wasn’t sure what to expect. Yes, I have run for statewide office before and won twice, but this is an even bigger type of contest. These Senate races are just so expensive. But then, literally MINUTES after I announced, Adam, a student from Morgantown chipped in $25. Not two minutes later, a higher ed administrator from Winston-Salem gave $100. In the next minute, Anna from Durham, a social worker, gave $50... and we were off. Since then almost 20,000 people have chipped into my campaign. It’s humbling. But with our FEC fundraising deadline just days away, we have our biggest challenge to-date in this race. And it’s why I have to ask: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | I am so proud of the way we are funding this campaign. But it will take ALL of us doing our part if we’re going to win. And that’s the goal. To flip this seat and win. Cheri Beasley ** Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611

God Bless, John McGuire Paid for by John McGuire for Virginia Use of John McGuires’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
